Neue CYOA: Deux

Builds

new cyoa

Options

Sound Effects: OFF
Ambience: OFF
Show Images on Hover: OFF
You Have Autism: NO
Arachnophobia Mode: OFF
Loading...
The Situation

You shall be emplaced within a new reality known as "The 'Verse." The 'Verse consists of myriad floating islands situated within an endless expanse of sky commonly referred to as 'the void.'


By default you will arrive on a 5x5x5 meter dirt island, hereafter referred to as 'your island' or the 'starting island'. It is equipped with a single 1x1x1 meter empty wooden chest and one (1) oak tree with semi-anomalous properties, hereafter referred to as your 'starting tree' or 'your tree'. The closest island to yours will not be less than 16km from the limits of your island.


All floating islands in The 'Verse are supported by Star Material. For more information, see Appendix C ("PROPERTIES OF STAR MATERIAL").


You will return to your reality upon completion of the Grand Task. Dying in The 'Verse with no means of resurrection shall result in Truedeath.


The Grand Task is to defeat the World Dragon. The World Dragon must be summoned at the World Mountain using the five (5) Radiant Shards.


The five Radiant Shards are dropped from the five Major Bosses:

  • - The Red Shard from the Magma Demon
  • - The Black Shard from the Black Hole Demon
  • - The Green Shard from the Radiation Demon
  • - The White Shard from the Ghost Demon, and
  • - The Dark Red Shard from the Lava Demon.

The five Major Bosses will spawn on islands somewhere within a radius of 2,500 Mm of your starting island. The World Mountain is 1 billion miles (~1.609e9 km) away from your starting island.


You are allotted a base 150 Points to create your Build. Your Build will consist of Runs and Items.


Runs increase the challenge of the Grand Task by adding additional constraints to its completion. Failing to meet the requirements of a Run shall result in Truedeath.


You must take at least one (1) Run. Each additional Run you take grants 50 points.


Items may be physical items, abilities, or other effects on your stay in The 'Verse. Items may cost or grant points.


For further clarification, see the Appendices or the FanDuel Footnotes.

Runs
Roko's Dragon
The World Dragon will spare you but only if you do everything in your power to further its goals.
Vengeance
The World Dragon's son has traveled back in time to prevent you from killing his father (or mother).
Rematch
Upon defeating the World Dragon, a stronger version of the World Dragon will spawn, now more adapted and knowledgeable to better counter your strategies.
This Isn't Even My Final Form
Upon defeating the second World Dragon, it will evolve into its Awakened Form for a third fight.
Gotta Catch Them All!
All 151 gen 1 Pokémon are loosed into the world! You must complete your collection before the World Dragon dies. You begin with 10 Pokéballs, and goblin traders occasionally sell them at exorbitant prices. Only Pokémon can be caught in Pokéballs. Pokémon remain hostile after being captured unless you have some method of taming them.
The Dad Who Stepped Up
You must complete your run while taking care of a perpetually 8-month-old half-somalian half-[your race] baby. Any harm, damage or feeling inflicted on or experienced by the baby is transferred to you with a 3x multiplier (including sadness, fear, hunger). Additionally, you mirror the baby’s excretory functions, without the ability to “hold it in.” The baby is indestructible, though anything that happens to the baby that would be fatal to it is instead superfatal to you.
Festive
Never fail to celebrate a holiday during your stay on the island. Calendar not included.[1][2]
Infamous
Start with -INF Reputation for all factions and races.
Stoneblock
Islands are instead caves surrounded by infinite solid rock in all directions WARNING: Limited oxygen![3][4]
Level of Violence
You must inflict a total of at least 1e18 GDP (Gross Damage Points).
Don't Stop
Staying within a zone of 3m x 3m x 3m for more than 30 minutes will cause you to violently explode.
World Series
The World Dragon and its Followers must be defeated in a baseball match. Choose your team wisely.
No Hit
If you take damage you die.
Mind Over Matter
You continuously feel the total collective pain and suffering of all creatures in The 'Verse.
Speedrun
Every time you do any action, a timer will come into view. Complete the action before the timer hits zero or your run is over.
The God Run
The run continues after you defeat the World Dragon and ends once you defeat God.
Collector's Edition
Collect 100 items with Supernova level rarity or higher
Forever Faithful
Within 3 years, you must get married to a denizen of The 'Verse. After that, you can no longer be more than 3 km from them without feeling linearly increasing emotional distress, must always be faithful to them (even after death), and cannot kill them or let them die through indifference.[5]
Paying it Forward
Before killing the World Dragon and during the first 100 years of your adventure, you must design Neo CYOA 三. It must have at least twice as many items as Neue CYOA Deux, and the items must collectively have equivalent or greater median sovl. The World Dragon will impartially judge your submission, once.
Busy Schedule
You are provided with a schedule book and pen. You must now schedule all activities appropriately or you'll incur a -90% penalty to all stats.[6]
World 4
Everything is bigger by a factor of 10 including land masses and creatures but not your starting island, tree, chest, items you take, or your body. Distances between islands are also longer by a factor of 10. Renewable food sources such as plants or prey animals are not affected by this.
The Escapee
The World Dragon and his minions have framed you! The caravan of High King Leothold of the Vaneck Jackelfs on his pilgrimage to the World's Light in High Yendor was cozened and robbed by a group of highwaymen who then kidnapped his daughter, Princess Anise. And the leader of these bandits? None other than you! Or so it seemed... Now you're one of The 'Verse's most wanted outlaws, with a bounty of 10,000,000 Sapphyres on your head. Additionally, Special 'Verse Task Force Omicron Epsilon has been deployed to track you down to the ends of The 'Verse, and they'll stop at nothing to make you talk. Will you find evidence to clear your name, or blacken it even further?
The Final Solution
In addition to the World Dragon and its kin, any other race that generally displeases you must be entirely wiped out.
Gameshark
Cheats are enabled, but Hell is real (again).[7]
Seduce and Destroy
Go on at least 25,000 dates with different women during your stay in The 'Verse.[8]
The Final Forgiveness
After defeating the World Dragon, you are brought to the afterlife. Before winning the run, you must make amends with all slain creatures, regardless of morality or intelligence, and get them to forgive you for killing them.
The Ultimate Showdown
In addition to defeating the World Dragon, you now have to defeat Cataclysm Godzilla, Nega Batman, Post-Cyberpocalypse Shaq, Demon Form Aaron Carter, Slave Owner Abraham Lincoln, Cracked Optimus Prime, Rainbow Belt Jackie Chan, Cursed Indiana Jones, Teh Care Bear Of Doom, Chuck Norris, Gandalf the Silver, Gandalf the Alabaster, Monty Python and the Holy Grail's funniest jokes, Allied Powers Mussolini, The Cobalt Meanie, Dark World Cowboy Curtis, Dark World Jambi the Genie, ChatGPT-powered RoboCop, Grok-powered The Terminator, Führer Kirk, Death Vader, Dragon-form Lo Pan, Locked In Superman, The "White Power" Rangers, Bill & Ted's Excellent Video Game Adventure for NES, Sigma Spock, The Rocket, Dr. Octogonapus, Comrade Hogan and Unbounded Mister Rogers.
Cart Life
You have a job preparing hotdogs at a small cart with an umbrella. you must work a minimum of 40 hours every week. You will lose one random item for every minute shy of 40hrs you are at the end of the week. Every hour of overtime worked provides a small bonus to a random stat. You are perpetually depressed. The smell of hotdogs cannot be washed out of your uniform and becomes slightly more pungent with every day worked.
May the Best Racer Win
You must now defeat the World Dragon in a Go-Kart race.[9][10]
Easy Mode
Gain +5.3% items, +1 all stats, but halfway through the run you will suddenly die of a heart attack and be told to play on normal mode to reach the true ending
Free To Pay
You can perform 30 free actions a day, after which you faint for 24 hours. More actions per day can be purchased with gems. Each action costs one gem.
Neutral Route
Upon defeating the World Dragon, your Alignment must be Neutral.[11]
Total Drama Island
Keep your viewers entertained, or the run ends.
Nameless
Learn the true name of an elder god of your choice who lost their domain during the Fall. Assist it in reconstruction of its aspect and receive rewards. All other gods will work against you.
The Bad Ending
It's over. The World Dragon has already taken over The 'Verse, destroying it and leaving what little of the population that remains in a state of chaos. All that's left for you do is to take The 'Verse back and try to salvage what is left...
The Walk
You can no longer run.
Fall Guys
There is now a death barrier 100 meters below your island that encompasses the entirety of The 'Verse. If you go beyond the barrier, you die and your run is over.[12][13]
Linked
You and the World Dragon are linked, physically and mentally. You know what the World Dragon sees and thinks at all times, and vice versa. Additionally, any wounds inflicted on the World Dragon are inflicted on you as well, but not vice versa for some reason. It seems that slaying this beast will be the death of you, literally.[14]
Run
Run.
Curse Of The Dawn
You take damage from The Sun.
YLYL
You instantly die should you utter as much as a snicker. Children's party clowns and Netflix comedians are inbound to your location.
A Battle of Wits
You must beat the World Dragon in a heated debate. Be warned; its words are as sharp as its claws, and its mind is as bright as its fire...
That Dragon, Cancer
The World Dragon can now utilize mental attacks against you from any distance.
Tactical
You now move on a grid-based system (+1 turn)
Super Picky
You can only eat chicken nuggets with no sauce. Anything else will give you 0 hunger.
The Balance
The more your Karmic Value strays from zero the longer the Strings that make up the universe are stretched.
Victory Royale
Exterminate all life in the universe. Every year, the eye of the storm shrinks.[15]
SPAAAAAAAAAAAACE!
The island now exists in a vacuum similar to space, with stars in the distance but no planets. You will be given adequate time to prepare at the start. Hope you brought your spacesuit!
Capeshit
All 'Verse creatures are now Superheroic. Roll a D9 for your own Superpower (view roll):
1. Invisibility
2. Mind Reading
3. Super-strength
4. Flight
5. Psychokinesis
6. Super-speed
7. Shape-shifting
8. Magic
9. Super-smarts
Let There Be Darkness
Holy attributes incense the Gods, and the unholy angers demons. The firmament instantly shatters. All the world will be your enemy.
On A Diet
If at any point in your run your BMI is considered overweight, the run is over and you die.
Long Way Down
Your island is no longer unaffected by gravity.
Itemless
-MAX Points.
Sightseer
Visit 10,000 islands.
Blood Brothers (AKA Co-Op 2)
Choose a friend to join you. You will be bound together by the Blood Pact. Choose two other runs and take no extra points. EVERYTHING will be twice as difficult...[16]
The Game
If you lose The Game, you die.
Neue Cyoa Babies
You now inhabit the unaging body of your infant self.
Home-Stuck
You have to defeat the World Dragon without leaving your starting island.
I Have a Special Plan for The 'Verse
You must remove The 'Verse from existence.
Everyone Disliked That
Humanity's space radio broadcasts were just too fucking reddit and gay, angering intergalactic powers. Hostile starfleets from multiple advanced alien races surround your island seconds after you spawn in.
The Political Machine
It's election season, and so you must win the hearts and minds of the people or use any other method you wish to beat the World Dragon in a bid for presidency. It'll be far from easy though as the World Dragon will similarly stop at nothing to become commander in chief, this means lobbying, dirty dealings, assassinations, smear tactics, the works. If you fail to become president you can try again after 4 years, but it will be significantly harder to oust the incumbent.
Wake up
Lose all your items. It hurts... I can still see... Where am I?
Boss Rush
All bosses except the World Dragon now spawn on your starting island[17]
Z-Rank
You must have a Score of at most 0 when you kill the World Dragon.
Ω-Rank
You must have a score of at most -1e9 when you kill the World Dragon.
Slowrun
Every time you do any action, a timer will come into view. Do not complete the action until the timer hits zero, or your run is over.
That Which Begins
The void around you is no longer a blue sky, but an endless black void. You can hear whispers beyond your island... You will not last very long.
Hero of Legend
"O Hero, we call upon you to protect us!" Uh, buddy... They're talking about YOU (if you take this Run).
You will be appointed as the Guardian Hero of a randomly selected civilization ("Your People") within a 150 km sphere from your starting island which is currently at war with a different civilization. As the Guardian Hero, you must accomplish the following: end the current war it's engaged in such that the outcome is generally favorable to Your People, ensure the continued prosperity and existence of Your People, and acquire for Your People 1000x more land than they currently possess. You are given a piece of paper with the name of Your People and a picture of their capital city (or village, hovel, etc)
The Real Treasure
Make 15,000 friends.[18]
All Life is Precious
You instantly die if you kill anything[19]
House Rules
All ensouled beings in The 'Verse may now buy volumes of space with gems, which become claimed as their Domain. For extra gems, Owner's Rules may be applied to Domains, which can restrict the actions ensouled beings may take within them. Societies in The 'Verse naturally become oriented around this.[20]
Neue High
You're now enrolled for 2 semesters in a high school on a nearby island, though you're not told which. You must get a date for the prom, which will happen within 1 year, and you must pass at least 2 classes.
School Days
You now have homework you need to do every day. Your assignments start at high school level and will increase in difficulty each year, unbounded. Failure to complete an assignment before the due date will result in death and the termination of the run.
The "Weird" Route
You need to pee constantly and also the clouds are made of urine vapor instead of water vapor and you need to drink pee of other creatures instead of water to survive and the air smells like piss.
A-Rank
You must have a Score of at least 1e9 when you kill the World Dragon.
S-Rank
You must have a Score of at least 1e15 when you kill the World Dragon.
Salesmanship
You're now hired by Gefelt the Greedy Goblin as a salesman of his Magical Midas Lacquer. You must make enough sales per month to keep his business afloat.[21][22][23]
Massively Multiplayer
You are not alone! Hundreds of the most determined humans from Earth are given their own islands and the same items you chose. First to kill the World Dragon wins! All losers experience Truedeath.
A Journey of Transformation
Reach level 999 in strength, farming, and cultivation.
Quid Pro Quo
Start off with a trash bin on your island. Every day you must throw 1 kg of matter into it. Matter inside is irretrievably lost. Every year the amount you need to put in increases by 25%.[24]
Shut Up, Faker!
Somewhere in the void an evil clone/doppelganger of yourself is also playing this CYOA, except their goal is to kill you and assist the World Dragon in its goals in any way possible.[25][26]
-45
Live And Learn
Your doppelganger is no longer mindlessly evil, just troubled and misunderstood. If you could just get through to him maybe you could join forces...
Thoughts And Prayers
You must perform the Lord's Prayer, the Liturgy of the Hours, the Fajr, Zuhr, Asr, Maghrib, and Isha, the Amidah, the Shacharit, Mincha, and Ma'ariv, the Sandhyavandanam, the Nitnem, the Sāmāyika, The 108 Prostrations, the Prajñāpāramita-Hṛdayam Sutra and the Ōharae no Kotoba daily.
Fuck All Of You
After defeating the World Dragon you will be given 5 years in your home universe to eradicate humanity.[27]
Back in Time for Dinner
You only have one afternoon to defeat the World Dragon. If you don't make it back in time, you will be forcibly teleported home and your mom will beat you.[28][29]
Carnivore
You only gain sustenance from human flesh.
Teh Urn
Tall Aext, Tords, Whoughts nnd Shrases era aow pcrambled.
Dogscape
Every island's terrain is replaced with dogs, except for Star Material which is replaced with Dog Material.[30]
Genocide
If anything you see stays alive for more than a day besides yourself you die.
Boggy's Basics
Every hour, a math problem will pop into the center of your vision. You have 15 minutes to solve it. If you answer incorrectly, the world loses a little bit of light. The difficulty of the problems increase with every correct answer and they never decrease in difficulty. The darkness effect is permanent and stacks, but correct answers will reset the light level. Don't let it get too dark...
Sleepover Game Night
You must defeat the World Dragon in a series of island-hopping minigames and dice rolls that follows Mario Party rules.
Minesweeper
Every floating island is now filled with hidden landmines.
The 'Verse Is Fucking Dead
Almost all NPCs fall into one of three groups: the majority perform rote, irrational, and wasteful routines like chopping down all the trees in a forest and then burning all of the wood in a huge pile. These will mostly not talk, though those that do will only repeat the same phrases over and over again. The other two types are: wandering, overpowered groups of NPCs that want to mindlessly kill anyone that crosses their paths, and groups of seemingly-regular NPCs gathered in town squares that silently stare off into the distance most of the time. The latter group will occasionally respond to you, sometimes speaking of the better times before this all happened, but will soon lapse back into their long silence.
Evil Has A Thousand Names
You must now collect the Mirror Shard by defeating the Multiplicity Demon in order to summon the World Dragon. The Multiplicity Demon will have possessed all the inhabitants of a nearby island and will devote all of their resources to finding and killing you, but will always try to conceal its existence. Only when all the possessed are dead or exorcised will the Multiplicity Demon be defeated.[31]
Play It Again
All bosses except the World Dragon respawn after 3 months.[32]
About Damn Time
Stay in The 'Verse for at least 2,000 years
For Fun & Profit
Collect 1e13 gems
[SPECIAL] You Can (Not) Choose Your Own Adventure
Item choices are made for you by a randomly-picked person.
Home Away From Home
You must grow your island to the size of Kazakhstan.
Don't Shit Your Pants
But you really have to go
To The Moon!
A huge white celestial body now rests 385,000 km above your island. Make your way to it and destroy it, but beware: werewolves love the full moon!
Getting Wood
Kill the World Dragon with only a stick.
Pet 'Scape
Instead of spawning on your starting island, you spawn in a 15 x 25 x 30 meter hamster cage located on an island 1 km away from it. A 70 meter tall featureless humanoid capable of wingless flight will care for you, providing meager but acceptable meals, water, and fresh bedding, but will always try to return you to your cage if you try to escape. It cannot understand your language.[33]
Get On My Level
All living things that would normally be weaker than you are now as strong as you are.
Every Dog Has Its Day
You are now a dog.
Items
-1
DOOM
Killing demons is now 666% more epic.
-1
Time Out
You have the ability to stop time.[34]
-1
Lucky Bag
Loot bags have a 0.01% chance of increasing your Lck by 0.01.
+40
Rollplay
During your stay in The 'Verse, you must roleplay as the character you roll below and stick to a fake backstory. Breaking character or failing to play your role will result in intense pain that can be fatal after a long enough period.
During your stay in The 'Verse, you must roleplay as the character you roll below and stick to a fake backstory. Breaking character or failing to play your role will result in intense pain that can be fatal after a long enough period.
Roll for your backstory. Everything you roll for (except the last 2 options) has no effect on your person, cosmetic or otherwise (view roll):

Your Quirk (d20):

2. You Love Talking In Riddles

4. You sometimes stare off into the distance pensively

6. You're exceedinly nonchalant in all situations

13. You often repeat things people say as a question even when you perfectly grasp what they've said

18. You click your tongue often
19. You deeply respect the customs of the person you talk to and try to integrate with them and learn more about their culture even if they don't care
20. You make theatrical and dramatic gestures

Cosmetic Addition 1 (You actually get this but it's mostly cosmetic -- if it isn't part of your body you must always wear it if you are not forcibly stripped) (d20):

Reinforcement Learning
It feels good when your Score increases.
+4
Sham Hypeman
You are incapable of telling the truth. Everything you say or write must contain at least a small lie. (+8 Dark)
-1
Large Rock
2x damage to glass bridges with people standing on them
-1
It's A Pretty View
Astolfo, is suicidal and will jump into the void.[36]
-1
NASA's Folly
A glowing crack appears in the firmament. (+1 Divine)
-1
Adventurer's Guild
A high quality profile is made for you on GuildIn advertizing your skills. You will need a suitable conduit and Intraley connection to access your profile.
+1
Snow Globe
You experience visual snow at all times.
-1
Come and Go
Every time you enter a door, it makes the “entering a gas station” sound
-100
One (1) ingot of unobtanium-insanium alloy
-1
DON'T
The script you would've written for that mystery box show you said were going to write appears on your island. Strange things start happening if you read it... (+3 Ach, +1 Wis, +1 Obscure, +"The Apparition")
+2
Alternative Medicine
Every day you wake up with a new acupuncture needle somewhere in your skin.[37]
-2
Gameplay is enhanced
-14
Human Science
Quaffing unknown potions will be guaranteed to not cause fatal harm or fatal poisoning
-1
The Stanley Parable
You may create a flat stanley of any design you wish and send it off to another random session and you will recieve one random flat stanley in return after seven business days
-1
Brofist
Your island comes with a single wooden barrel (+1 Char)
+1.5
Immersion
Every race speaks a different conlang invented by a different autistic 16 year old
-1
64 chinesium ingots
-1
The Raped
Rapeseed is now 500% more common
-1
+1 AGI...?
-1
The Promised Land
Your island takes up the same volume/square meters, but it is now shaped like a six-sided star. (+1 Chutzpah)
-12
Inconsequential Land Dispute
The size of your starting island is multiplied by 4, but there's a town of Elfkin not too far away that claim your island belongs to them. (+1 Little Problem)[38]
-1
Verseland
Amusement parks in The 'Verse are more common, fun, and dangerous.
-10
Inventory
A piece of college ruled notebook paper. Anything written on it that is carried on your person will return to you if it is lost or stolen.[39][40]
-1
Wagie
A button that, when pressed, allows you to work a fast food service job for as long as you want (1 million years minimum) and receive the corresponding payment based on minimum wage.[41]
-1
500 milliliters of liquid nitrogen in a brown paper bag.
-1
Saintly
Your dead body will never decay
+2
Color Blindness
+3
Silent Chills
There is now permanent fog in the void, reducing visibility everywhere to about 20 meters.
+2
They Follow
You can see Them in the fog.
-1
Options Menu
You may optionally disable music, view bobbing, motion blur, bloom, and god rays IRL.
+50
Housing Crisis
The entire 8-billion-and-counting population of earth is spawned on your island. No size increase included.
-1
Don't TAS Me Bro
A maximally-optimized defeat of the World Dragon and all events leading up to it are shown to you in the form of a tool assisted speedrun. You do not gain any progress from this run and your memory of it is erased upon the run's completion, but it will give you a small sense of being entertained for its runtime.
-2
I Need Scissors, 61
61 pairs of kids safety scissors are yours now. (+10 Singularity Acceleration)
+1.5
Deep Lore
Lootboxes have a 1% chance of only containing copies of random written correspondences of different NPCs in The 'Verse.
-13
Vacation Destination
A map to the Gilded Isles + a brochure.
-1
Must-See Places
Your map includes the scenic route, which includes stops at Pangerey Falls, The Quasar Nexus, and Gnomehell.
-1
Tourist
Khakis, flip-flops, cheap plastic sunglasses, and a Hawaiian shirt (+0.7 Tropicality)
-1
Laid Back
A foldable beach lounge chair.
-1
Never Miss A Moment
An instant print camera which can take 40 photos.[42][43][44]
-1
It'll Last Longer
It can now take 500 photos.
-2
Photographic Memory
It can now take 50,000 photos
-12
Ultimate Scrapbooker
It can now take 50,000,000 photos.[45]
-35
Spirit of the Jester
Wearing a full clown suit multiplies your End by 1.5x
-34
You Are A Toy
Secrets of Golemancy are revealed to you. 100 souls can be used to create 1 artificial soul capable of inhabiting 10kg of matter[46]
-1
A set of 5 ceramic plates decorated with a checkerboard pattern
-1
Positive Feedback Loop
A blank piece of paper which becomes more attractive to you the more you masturbate to it.
-1
An ancient, enchanted GPU from a lost civilization. Specifications unknown.
-1
Mist
Your island comes with mysterious underground puzzles but the solutions are gated behind annoying gay lore that takes too long to read. (+1 mid, +5 combination locks, +5 backstory diary entries no one cares about, -20 fun)
-40
Inaction Figure
You can become entirely solid plastic at will.[47][48][49]
-87
A wooden fishing boat that always hovers at the same height, though it can be pushed up or down with enough force

You will receive a daily newspaper full only of obituaries for residents of The 'Verse that died the previous day

Through The Fire and Flames
Void Dragons now spawn as well

1 Month of 4chan Gold
(+2.0 Understanding)

Mementos

DUUUUUUDE!!!!

Po-Oc
Your anti-form joins you on the island. If you come into physical contact with them it will cause an explosion releasing 1,000 foes of energy.

How Do I Summon Succubus?

-10
Wrong Warp
Intraversal wormholes are now common in The 'Verse.
-135
World 1-1
Your starting island has a wormhole on it that leads to a different island.
-70
The Nexus
Your starting island now has 12 different wormholes leading to different islands.
-350
Credits Warp
There is a wormhole on your starting island leading directly to the World Mountain.

Teleport Maze
Wormholes are no longer guaranteed to have symmetric destinations.
-1
Luck of The Irish
If you're Irish, your Lck is raised by x1.01
-50
The Isles of Albion
A series of large islands themed upon Merry England appear not too far from you. These jolly islanders will often set sail in their skyships and venture to faraway lands looking to establish trade or colonies. Cheerio![51]
-1
Vaccinated
You become immune to all viruses, fungi, and bacteria, but this includes your gut microbiome
+10
Tales From The 'Verse: Escape From The Sky Island Collector's Edition
Puzzles involving random objects now plague you wherever you go.
-1
Guess Who's Back
The Grim Reaper from The Grim Adventures of Billy and Mandy joins you on your adventure. However, looks like he left his scythe back home this time...
-1
Fasting
For every 3 consecutive days you don't eat or drink anything nourishing you permanently gain +0.1 Spd. If you last for 6 days you gain +0.35 Spd.[52][53][54]
-20
Dashing
You just got 20% cooler.
-1
You are immune to Knockback, but you pass lead stool instead of normal feces.
-3
I Yam What I Yam
One (1) can of spinach from Popeye. Tastes like motor oil
-3
Beauty and the Beast
The combined total of your Chr and Str can be allocated to only one or the other at any given time. Switching between the two takes a day.

Starter Familiars
2,500 loyal fruit flies which will follow your every command.
-1
A traditional elfish yarmulke
-1
Happily Ever After
After you defeat the World Dragon, all the bosses resurrect and you go out to "the pub" as "mates" for an evening. (+1 to all Squirming traits)

Splat
You can now create 4 illusory copies of an object you're holding to your left or right, each separated by a distance of 1 meter.
-13
Swizzle
You may now swap objects you are holding with their illusory copies
-10
Switching Sides
Rift Serpents, Void Drakes, and Wyrm Guardians are no longer loyal to the World Dragon.
-28
Protagonistic Sway
You are the main character of this story. Others are drawn to you and go along with your plans, but they lack interiority and have to be micromanaged. Enemies are mindlessly evil and difficult to persuade.

Talk no Jutsu
You can now more easily persuade enemies.
+3
High Functioning

Green and Purple

Your choices don't matter.

Come Again?

Night Raper
While completely unencumbered (wearing no clothing or equipment and carrying no items), you may slow down your subjective experience of time by up to 50%, absorb 50% of light, become translucent to 50% of unabsorbed light, cancel 50% of noise your body causes directly, and may become completely undetectable to sentient, sub-Divine beings by inhabiting all valid positions within 2m of solid matter (other than your own body) in a region bounded by a greater than 50% likelihood of one or more sentient, sub-Divine beings detecting your presence (if not for this sub-ability), which can be collapsed at will to rematerialise your form, and is forcibly collapsed when the region's volume is reduced below your physical volume. If the region is partitioned into disjoint subregions, you must choose which subregion to inhabit. (+7 Dark, +13 Caliginy)[59]

Evil Starter Pack
(+6.66 EVL, -99 Holy, +0.666 PWR, +1 Doom)

Comfort Food

Cannonball!
Your starting island gets outfitted with a diving board
-5
Star Fruit

Binary Tree

What's Cookin'?

-1
Elflord Scheme
The warlock ensnares you with an ancient incantation, upon waking from a horrifying feverish dream, you now find yourself shapeshifted into a lost race of elf, thought extinct, you suffer from their bygone ailments, unknown to current medicine and incurable, such as early-onset rheumatoid arthritis of the hands (similar symptoms, but a misdiagnosis) and a rare form of early cone-rod dystrophy and macular degeneration, the lights and the sky look black, your vision is low, very low resolution, dot matrix even, and everything is perceived as unreadable symbols in a 24x80 grid, in a harsh white, yellow, red, cyan or magenta, which cause eye strain and headaches, you prefer to keep your eyes closed. Upon making contact with the Elvish Faction, their leaders recognize you from myths, folklore and fairy tales of their childhood, they offer you nobility, granting you the right to buy lands and command subordinates, but only if you have enough gems. (+10 Elf Alignment)

You Can Take It With YouYou Can Take It With You

Learned Sage

I'm Eggcellent

Quality You Pay For

Cultured

Altman Alternatives
You may take any of these AI-Generated items for half-off the price listed. But be warned: Each item you take increases the chance of dooming humanity to an Infinite Total Suffering S-Risk Scenario by 10% (additive).[85][-2]
-4
-50%
1. Porcelain Toenail Collection
A neatly labeled case containing 48 of someone’s toenails, made of porcelain. Can be thrown like shuriken but will shatter if you miss. (+2 Style, +10 P(s-doom))
-15
-50%
2. Gravity Reverse Card
Once per day, you can invert gravity for everything within a 5-meter radius… including yourself. (+1 Chaos, -12 Spinal Integrity, +10 P(s-doom))
-3
-50%
3. Cursed Pretzel Rod
An eternally stale pretzel rod that whispers your regrets back to you in reverse. Eating it heals 1 HP but permanently reduces your self-esteem by 7%. (+10 P(s-doom))
-12
-50%
4. Cube of Infinite Bees
A cube that constantly spawns 1 bee per second until it is thrown into the void. Bees are non-aggressive but block movement. (+25 Annoyance, +10 P(s-doom))[-3]
-2
-50%
5. Grandpa’s Left Slipper
Smells faintly of mothballs and gasoline. Wearing it increases movement speed by 5% but doubles fall damage. (+10 P(s-doom))
-4
-50%
6. Vegan Vampire Kit
A bundle of non-blood-based substitutes, including beet juice “wine” and tofu stakes. Attracts ethical undead. (+12 Pretension, +10 P(s-doom))
-6
-50%
7. Sentient Mop
Will clean your island compulsively and occasionally judge you in a thick French accent. (+8 Hygiene, +10 P(s-doom))
-9
-50%
8. The Crowbar of Quiet Violence
Deals bonus sneak attack damage but makes an oddly wet *squelch* instead of a metallic clang. (+5 Stealth, -15 Respect, +10 P(s-doom))
-13
-50%
9. Quantum Egg
Its exact content cannot be known until it is cracked. Every crack may spawn food, explosives, or your worst enemy. (+1 Scientific Curiosity, +10 P(s-doom))
+2
-50%
10. Friendly Guillotine
A portable guillotine that refuses to be used for executions but will give you “friendly haircuts.” (+1 Intimidation, +10 P(s-doom))
-5
-50%
11. Jar of Imaginary Spiders
You cannot see them, but you’re convinced they’re inside. Periodic phantom itching applies permanent -3 Composure. (+10 P(s-doom))
-8
-50%
12. Flavored Oxygen Canisters
Breathe bubblegum or bacon air for +2 Mood, -1 Lung Longevity. (+10 P(s-doom))
-7
-50%
13. Glowstick of Authority
Cracking it makes you irresistible to bureaucrats for 6 hours. (+40 Paperwork, +10 P(s-doom))
-14
-50%
14. Infinite Soup Ladle
No matter where you dip it, it scoops up clam chowder. Cannot be thrown away. (+6 Sustenance, +10 P(s-doom))[-4]
-5
-50%
15. Haunted AirPods
They *always* connect. The music is great, but ghosts occasionally skip to unsettling Gregorian chants at full volume. (+12 Catholic Guilt, +10 P(s-doom))
-4
-50%
16. Thumbtack Familiar
A tiny, loyal thumbtack that follows you and occasionally rolls into your enemies’ path. May also roll into *your* path. (+10 P(s-doom))
-1
-50%
17. Solar-Powered Nightlight
Never works when you actually need it. (+10 P(s-doom))
-3
-50%
18. The Finger of Karl
A withered, mummified finger labeled simply: “Karl.” Pointing it at people gives you a 60% chance to make them sneeze. (+10 P(s-doom))
-2
-50%
19. Brick of Unrequited Love
It’s just a brick, but you feel bad throwing it. (+10 Melancholy, +10 P(s-doom))
-22
-50%
20. Wormhole Sock
Put anything inside and it vanishes forever. There’s a 0.01% chance it comes back holding an angry message. (+100 Mystery, +10 P(s-doom))
-1
-50%
21. Bag of Sobbing Marshmallows
They taste fine but weep softly whenever bitten. (+3 Sad Energy, +10 P(s-doom))
+5
-50%
22. The Government-Approved Stick
It’s just a stick, but if you break it you will be fined by an interdimensional tax auditor. (+10 P(s-doom))
-8
-50%
23. Jar of Pickled Noise
Every time you open it, a random loud sound blasts out at 200 decibels. (+50 Startle, +10 P(s-doom))
-2
-50%
24. Terribly Taxidermied Weasel
Looks wrong in ways that bother reality itself. +1 Chaos Power, -3 Trustworthiness. (+10 P(s-doom))
-1
-50%
25. Half-Translated Manga
Missing every 3rd page. Characters occasionally address you directly in Japanese. (+10 P(s-doom))
-7
-50%
26. Orthopedic Chainsaw
Specially balanced for “safe” cutting, but has a 10% chance to cut in slow motion while screaming your full name. (+10 P(s-doom))
+4
-50%
27. Spicy Pillowcase
Sleeping on it buffs Melee Damage by +2 but sets your dreams on fire (+10 P(s-doom))
-6
-50%
28. Schrödinger’s Lunchbox
Contains either a delicious meal or a horrifying crime scene. (+12 Risk, +10 P(s-doom))
-3
-50%
29. Plastic Armor
Full set. Completely weightless, completely useless. NPCs treat you like you’re important though. (+10 P(s-doom))
-4
-50%
30. MP3 Player with One Track
The track is “Cotton Eye Joe” but at unpredictable speeds. (+1 Speed, -20 Mental Stability, +10 P(s-doom))
+3
-50%
31. Cube of Cold Hands
Holding it permanently lowers your body temperature by 2°C. You *do* get +10 grip strength though. (+10 P(s-doom))
-10
-50%
32. Grandma’s Mystery Jar
Hasn’t been opened since “The Incident.” Opening it rolls 1d100 on Grandma’s Table. (+10 P(s-doom))
+6
-50%
33. Soggy Bible
Waterlogged, unreadable, and smells like old fish. +1 Cursed Aura, -12 Holy Alignment. (+10 P(s-doom))
-1
-50%
34. Rock That’s Just a Rock
There’s nothing special about it. You’re wasting points. (+10 P(s-doom))
+3
-50%
35. Bag of Screaming Coins
They scream when spent. Merchants will hate you. (-12 Charisma, +10 P(s-doom))
-13
-50%
36. Iron Lung but it’s Portable
Keeps you breathing no matter what. You can’t fit through doorways while inside it. (+10 P(s-doom))
-2
-50%
37. Pet Ghost Crab
Does nothing but stare at you at night from the foot of your bed. (+5 Paranoia, +10 P(s-doom))
+8
-50%
38. Mind-Melting Crossword Puzzle
Cannot be completed without losing 10 IQ per clue solved. (+10 P(s-doom))
-7
-50%
39. Inflatable Cathedral
Fully functional, deflates if you swear. (+10 P(s-doom))
-16
-50%
40. Doom-Stapler
Every 100 staples, opens a localized hell rift. (+3 Evil Street Cred, +10 P(s-doom))[-5]
-9
-50%
41. Ham of Destiny
A single glazed ham that regenerates itself every sunrise. The taste changes daily, but one day will taste like the void. (+1 Infinite Snack, +20 Foreboding, +10 P(s-doom))[-6]
+5
-50%
42. The Fourteenth Commandment
It’s written on a napkin in pencil. Reading it out loud makes all milk in the universe curdle instantly. (-∞ Dairy Alignment, +10 P(s-doom))[-7]
-3
-50%
43. Two-Headed Umbrella
Shields you from rain *and* suspicion, but doubles incoming wind damage. (+10 P(s-doom))
-8
-50%
44. Musical Guillotine
Chops *beautifully* in tune with “Flight of the Bumblebee.” Cannot be stopped once it starts. (+10 P(s-doom))
-7
-50%
45. Spider Milk Jug
Filled with thick, lukewarm milk of unknown eight-legged origin. Drinking it gives +2 Night Vision for 1 hour, then makes your teeth itchy. (+10 P(s-doom))
-6
-50%
46. Hourglass of Misunderstanding
Reveals the truth about *one* thing every 24 hours… but you interpret it completely wrong. (+50 Confidence, -500 Accuracy, +10 P(s-doom))
+4
-50%
47. Rotten Velvet Gloves
Soft, luxurious, and smell like a dying raccoon. Enemies underestimate you, allies avoid you. (+10 P(s-doom))
-5
-50%
48. Bagpipe Familiar
Plays on its own when you’re in danger, but only songs about potatoes. (+3 Noise-based Stealth?, +10 P(s-doom))
-2
-50%
49. Milk-Cart Blueprints
Allows you to craft the “Milk Cart” vehicle. It doesn’t move. (+10 P(s-doom))
-10
-50%
50. Lantern That Burns Cold
Lights up beautifully but lowers the temperature around you by 20°C. (+8 Drama, +10 P(s-doom))
-12
-50%
51. Dead Man’s Flip Phone
Calls connect to someone *else’s* nightmares. Sometimes they call back. (+2 Spook Factor, +10 P(s-doom))
-4
-50%
52. Gelatin Sword
Bounces off enemies with a comedic *boing* but leaves them inexplicably sticky. (+10 P(s-doom))
-6
-50%
53. Fungus Crown
Looks regal, slowly releases spores that cause mild hallucinations and make your voice echo weirdly. (+10 Mad King Aura, +10 P(s-doom))
+3
-50%
54. Puppet That’s Definitely Alive
Makes sarcastic commentary, but also reports your every move to a mysterious Council. (+10 P(s-doom))
-1
-50%
55. Calendar of Bad Days
All dates are wrong. Following it guarantees every day will be unlucky for *someone*. (+10 P(s-doom))
+6
-50%
56. Ice Cream Machine (McDonald’s Model)
Always broken. Standing near it makes everyone slightly angrier. (+10 P(s-doom))
-2
-50%
57. Lanternfish Companion
Floats beside you, emitting faint light. Smells powerfully of the ocean at all times. (+3 Atmospheric Suffering, +10 P(s-doom))
-5
-50%
58. Crossbow of Wasted Effort
Perfectly accurate but fires only toothpicks. (+10 P(s-doom))
-4
-50%
59. Dehydrated Pond
Just a jar of cracked mud and dead algae. Pouring water on it restores 1 small angry fish. (+10 P(s-doom))
+2
-50%
60. Uncle Barry’s Wedding Suit
Three sizes too big, but NPCs assume you’re in charge of *something*. (-20 Mobility, +10 P(s-doom))
-4
-50%
61. Bag of Teeth (Misc.)
Every tooth is unique, like they came from different species. If arranged correctly, they “point” somewhere — but the bag keeps rearranging itself at night. (+10 Ominous Vibes, +10 P(s-doom))
-6
-50%
62. The Twelfth Spoon
No one remembers making the first eleven. Stirring any liquid with it makes the surface reflect somewhere that’s *not here.* (+3 Eldritch Kitchen Aura, +10 P(s-doom))
-5
-50%
63. Coconut Full of Sand
Clearly hollowed out and refilled. Sand keeps pouring out endlessly, even if smashed. (+1 Hourglass Energy, -10 Patience, +10 P(s-doom))[-8]
-3
-50%
64. “It’s Not Blood” Spray Bottle
The label says it’s not blood. It smells like blood. It works as an incredibly effective weed killer. (+10 P(s-doom))
+2
-50%
65. Drawing of the World Dragon (Child’s Crayon)
Crude and colorful. The dragon is smiling in this one. The crayon marks keep moving. (+1 Unease, +10 P(s-doom))
-9
-50%
66. Manual of Non-Euclidean Knots
Can only be read when you’re asleep. Tying anything with these knots makes it harder to *untie you*. (+10 P(s-doom))
-2
-50%
67. Mismatched Dice
When rolled, one die always comes up six. The other… never lands. No one’s found it yet. (+10 P(s-doom))
+3
-50%
68. Latchkey That Opens No Door
Glows faintly in moonlight that doesn’t exist here. (+50 Intrigue, +10 P(s-doom))
-6
-50%
69. VHS Tape – “Dragon Sightings Compilation, 1994”
Mostly static. At minute 46, someone is clearly recording from *your island*. (+7 Anxiety, +10 P(s-doom))
+5
-50%
70. Inverted Bucket Helmet
Wearing it muffles the void’s whispering but makes it hard to breathe. (+10 P(s-doom))
-1
-50%
71. Repeating Alarm Clock
No snooze button. Rings every 47 minutes and 12 seconds. Sometimes it skips a day. (+10 P(s-doom))[-9]
-4
-50%
72. Jar of “Fresh” Water
Tastes slightly metallic. At the bottom is a tiny scale the size of a fingernail. (+1 Possible Dragon Lore, +10 P(s-doom))
-8
-50%
73. Lantern That Doesn’t Cast Shadows
No matter what you light, shadows disappear within a 10m radius. Works disturbingly well on people. (+10 P(s-doom))
-7
-50%
74. “Eggs of No Concern”
Four large white eggs, warm to the touch. Every time you check, one is in a different spot. (+15 Suspicion, +10 P(s-doom))

-50%
75. Rusted Compass (Points Nowhere)
When you hold still, it points somewhere. When you walk, it spins wildly. (+5 Curiosity Damage, +10 P(s-doom))

-50%
76. “The Choir” in a Jar
A jar of dark liquid that hums in harmony with your heartbeat. (+10 P(s-doom))

-50%

Engraved with a number you can’t quite focus on. The metal feels *too* warm. (+10 What Maintenance Crew?, +10 P(s-doom))

-50%
78. Stack of News Clippings
Stories about missing islands, “dragon accidents,” and something called the Basketball Stadium Tragedy. (+3 Lore Dump, +10 P(s-doom))

Can hook items far beyond your visible range — but occasionally drags something *closer*. (+40 Risk, +10 P(s-doom))

Reads temperature out loud in an aggressive tone. Constantly swears when below freezing. (+10 P(s-doom))

Double Trouble

Pride Month
Every sentient being is now gay for once a month every year.
-35
This New Update Ruined The 'Verse
You can now level swimming (SWM). SWM experience has dynamic multipliers depending on how dangerous the liquid is. A bonus multiplier is applied for swimming inside of living creatures. At level 999 SWM you may swim in any fluid, gas or liquid, at 1/100th the speed of your base water swim speed. The fluid swimming speed scales linearly with every level after 999.[87]
-1
Ready-Made
Bluesmiths can now repair Common and Fallen Mystical equipment.
-1
ORIGINAL SOUNDTRACK
Activities and actions in your life now play personalized SFX and background music created and composed by Toby Fox, which envelops and surrounds you 24/7 all throughout the day.[88]

Shrink Ray

+15
Single Sign On
Every few days, you will need to say an (at least) 12 character password aloud to continue using your body. If anyone repeats your password to you, they can control you. You will be asked to change your password every 3 months.[89]
+5
2FA
You receive a Rubik's Cube you need to configure into a certain pattern before you can say your password
-1
Steins Gate
You can now travel between other similar 'Verse parallel timelines where things are slightly changed but not enough to notice any differences.

Waterproof
The amount of PFAS in your blood is doubled. (+15 Water Resist)

'Verses's Worst Boss
Any business owned by you is 15% more efficient if at least 40% of the employees hate their job.

Insane Pulls
Every item you took now has a randomized prefix. Some possible prefixes include: Ephemeral, Retarded, Mid, Legendary, Superb, A little better, Much worse, Shitty, Trite, Aura, etc.[90]

Creatine is now doubly effective

Happy Appy

License to Sin
The Torah
-1

-99
The Gooner
Summon a new goon each week to do your bidding. Goons have low intellect but are loyal.[95]
-1
The Points Dealer
You want more points, kid? You got 'em...at a price, o' course. A mysterious hooded figure you can trade with for more points. Who he is and where he's getting these points from, no one knows. His exchange rates are horrible; exorbitant amounts of Hyperionical gems or incredibly rare materials will net you just one measly point. There's almost no other way to get them though, so what can you do?[96]
-40
Not Cool, Man
You start with 6 (black) slaves that will do your bidding. No catch, but everyone you meet will think it's kinda weird and may attempt to stop you depending on their light/dark alignment and your reputation with them. (+5 Evilness)
-15
Lurk Moar
Your body is now a black silhouette.
-1
Fraternal Damnation
A narrow cobblestone path leading off the northwest edge of your island leads to a Greater Haunted Frat House about 0.5km away. Be warned, a single Greater Undead Brotherhood Chair could easily defeat an Infernal Wurm or Mired Cragbeast.
-1
You can conduct heat through your body better
-1

Arborist

An OLED screen is added to your forehead that displays all of your thoughts in plaintext, including descriptions of images.

What A Deal!

-70
An empty cubic spawner with a volume of one cubic meter.
Any living creature of mass one gram or greater placed inside will be repeatedly duplicated in the surrounding nine cubic meters at an interval depending on its mass. Time interval in seconds is equal to the creature's mass in decigrams to the one and one halfth power.[105]

On Call

The tablet will periodically receive video calls from a 41 year old man who works in the dairy department of a supermarket. He will want to talk with you. The topics are usually limited to feedback on his ideas for a sketch comedy show, 80s movies he likes, or his complaints about politics. If you do not maintain a good enough relationship with him the tablet will shut off forever.[116][117]

The Die is Cast
You recive a 3-sided die, and are prompted to pick one side you think it will land on. A selection of graphic tees and snapback baseball caps with bootleg naruto, jack skellington, and oldguysrule designs on them plus a few chain wallets 2. A selection of wacky toys including battery operated toy dogs, rc helicopters, and colorful disco lights, and one quarter-full gumball machine which is filled with watermelon gumballs 3. A selection of designer sunglsses and a massage chair that requires 20 Simolifarthings to operate for 10 minutes., if you guess incorrectly, you have to preface your journey in the 'Verse with 1 year of life as a wad of chewed up gum stuck to a city wall in detroit which may serve as an important trait in a future 'Verse job interview...

-1
Legendary Companion: Slime Overlord Peter-Qo-Jell
Peter was a serious young boy who set out into the forest to slay slimes.
He wanted to grow in power to protect his village.
He carried a longsword, and wore basic cotton clothing.

Peter understood well enough that his parents had sent him into the wilderness to keep him occupied more than out of any need for protection. These low level slimes posed no threat to the village.
He also tired of dealing with his parents, who somehow managed to be simultaneously neglectful and demanding, so possessed by an unusual whimsy, he simply chose not to return home one evening.
Peter slept soundly on the forest floor, and awoke mysteriously untouched by insects or other creatures of the night.
He continued like this as weeks blurred into months, and lost himself in the telos of slime death.
Peter pressed forward slaying slimes and doing little else, too deep in the wilderness to be found by any search parties.
His parents must have assumed he died at some point.
He ate a diet of mostly slime, a monster drop thought to be toxic and inedible even to animals, but Peter found it tasted quite pleasant after a long day of slime culling.

The average person knows slimes for their habits of absorption and molestation, but fewer are aware of their psychological and noospheric capabilities.
Recent studies suggest a statistical link between naturalists who study slimes and those who develop early-onset dementia.
Further study has yet to reveal the following, but slimes also have deleterious effects on the minds of adventurers who slay them through contact with splattered slime, even in the brief moments before the slimes' death.
Peter, like any other adventurer, would ordinarily have been expected to lose a few basis points of Int after slaying hundreds of slimes over the summer.
However, his mind felt clearer than it ever had while living with his parents.
While murdering slimes with his longsword, Peter felt a bizarre, yet impossibly natural serenity without any loss of alertness.
Cutting through thick brush and slimes alike with a sharp eye, the path ahead couldn't have been more obvious.

Although when Peter found himself at the gates of a coastal city with nothing but oddly intact clothing and a longsword, he wondered briefly where his legs were taking him.
Surely the few slimes he sensed in this city could not be better slays than those that spawned in the deep wilderness?
A few uncommon jewels collected from yesterday's slimes were enough to pay for lodging at a local tavern.
Peter struck up conversation with some of the guests while watching the sun set.
Months of aimless wander-slaughter without human contact hadn't dulled his ability to communicate in the slightest, in fact Peter found himself to possess a surprising charisma belying his age.
Peter effortlessly maintained the false persona he had prepared in advance, but actually stumbled over his words when his interlocutor casually mentioned that her expedition party's airship would be leaving tomorrow for Slime Island.
His mind, rapidly catching up with his instincts, instantaneously understood why the greater purpose that provided him salvation had brought him to this time and moment.
Of course, he must board this airship.
The expedition party was hesitant, but something about this strange boy reassured them, as if his desire to learn more about slimes was more compelling than their own mission.
They set off and as the airship landed on Slime Island, Peter slew every member of the expedition in the night.

The slimes on Slime Island were much larger and more diverse than those from his homeland, but Peter's capabilities rose to meet the task.
Slaying these slimes made him feel more alive and attuned with himself than ever. He barely ate or slept.
Some of the most dangerous higher level slimes specialized in absorption of intellect, and used advanced combat tactics to hide themselves before paralyzing prey in seconds.
Peter quickly began to understand that not only was he immune to these attacks, he seemed to reflect them.
As a Striped Carmine-Grey slime that had caught him in an ambush attempted to smother him, he felt a surge of focus and the slime sloshed limply onto the rocky ground.
The answer came from within before Peter's mind formed the question, as he reached down to touch the broken slime and absorbed its remaining conceptual essence, reducing its form to dust.
He could tell, from touching the slime, that its cytoplasm was less pure than his own.
Inexplicably, Peter by killing slimes had become more slime than this slime. But how?
Were these impurities born from non-digestible concepts the slime had absorbed, following its blind instincts? Or perhaps from the necessity that the practicalities of life as a low-perplexity life form limit its entelechy?
The Striped Carmine-Grey had grown wiser by rejecting its slime aspect, in opposition to his own journey.
Either way, it was apparent that a slime only capable of absorption through physical contact was not a true slime.
And with that understanding, Peter also understood how his Way of the Ooze had thusfar kept him from losing himself while floating in the boundless psychic awareness of a sea of slimes.

The slimes he slashed open were purified, much like the slimes themselves purified their victims.
Peter purified a lot of slimes every day for a long time, and meditated instead of sleeping.
Slime Island was vast, and his purification did not have any impact on their total population.
One day, while meditating on Slime Island, the Slime King appeared on the horizon.
Perhaps it was attracted by his activities, or perhaps the meeting was entirely by chance.
As soon as he noticed its ripples in the psychic ocean, Peter without exiting trance gripped his longsword and hastened to purify the Slime King.
Moved by his purity of will, and with a primal understanding that standing against this man would be to deny its own existence, the Slime King overextended a thousand pseudopods before Peter could strike at range with psychic attacks.
The Slime King explosively ruptured its own membrane, raining down refined royal slime across the entire island.
The Slime King's crown, several meters across, rolled along the beach and arrived before Peter.
Rather than changing his form to fit the crown, he consumed the concept of the Slime King and redefined it such that it was himself.
Peter wears the former slime king's crown and retains his human form to this day.
He took the name Peter-Qo-Jell (or "Peter from Slime"), christening himself as a being that had ascended beyond what slimes once were.

What exactly was it that possessed Peter that evening he decided not to return to his parents' home?
Despite perfect exocognitive clarity of thought, he does not know for sure.
Peter-Qo-Jell could see now that the gestalt Slimemind, while possessing far greater psychic force, was unable to coordinate more than a primitive, constant urge, and the former Slime King, while it lived, could not have been much more sophisticated.

In the end, Peter's village was destroyed by low level slimes which mysteriously began to show levels of aggression and intelligence previously unheard of.
He left Slime Island on his slimeship for distant lands shortly after becoming Slime Overlord.
Peter-Qo-Jell lives across all slimes, and appears to revive from slime if his primary physical form is destroyed.
He exists as the hyperconscious embodiment of the greater Slime will, and cannot be easily persuaded or deceived without psychic capacity to rival the Slimemind.
Peter-Qo-Jell's instinctive powers of influence and manipulation are as frightening as his direct attacks. He can effect direct attacks over long distances without the requirement for physical contact which was once the greatest weakness of slimes.

Peter-Qo-Jell joins your island.

Dogs get so excited when they see you that they have seizures and die.
-30
Seat of Power
A throne suspended on an extremely thin 40 foot pole appears somewhere on your island. While you sit on it you will recieve massive random stat boosts over a bi-weekly period, but if you get up from the throne at any point the stats will be purged and you will have to sit and accumulate the boosts again. Also, you being so high in the sky has drawn the attention of the jealous and territorial Zephyr Bandits who will aim violent storm winds towards you. (+Epic stat boosts, +Kingly Aura)
+5
Time Blindness
You can no longer grasp the time from any type of clock.
-1
All The Comforts of Home
The Shadow Reader will read you 1 random creepypasta each night before you go to sleep.
-1
Red Rum
Rum now enrages all races of The 'Verse, making them ULTRAVIOLENT. Dwarves and the Pirate faction are now GENOCIDAL.
-1
German Engineering
Gas chambers and other mass death machines are now 50% more efficient.
+3
The Prisoner
You start with an iron collar around your neck chained to a steel post in the ground.
-1
Bad Trip
The biome your starting island occupies is now a mix between Machinescape and Evil Geometry.
-40
The Great Work
Every hour you spend in complete silence generates one Gerah of pure gold. Any noise you cause above 10 decibels will reset this countdown.
-7
You get a handheld decibel meter that never runs out of battery.
-15
Your tongue is cut off, but you receive 5 Gerahs of pure gold as an apology.
-1
A Pound of Flesh
A pound of uncooked pork shoulder
-5
An unfertilized human egg frozen inside an ice cube.
-1
Eye Wood If I Could
Your starting tree has eyes and can see!
-1
CHICKEN JOCKEY!
You can ride any living creature.
-1
Dye of Amaclastus
This one-time use item will let you apply a glow-in-the-dark effect or digital camouflage to any piece of armor, no matter its level.[141]
-3.5
One Man, One Jar
A 12 oz glass mason jar
-1
DIE POTATO!
Your starting tree is replaced with a potato plant.
-1
I Like Trains
Your starting tree is replaced with a non-functional train's front car.

Problem, Officer?

The Dark Era

Heavy is the Crown

-3
A king size sleeping bag
-25
I Wear My Sunglasses At Night
Wearing sunglasses in the dark gives you night vision.[143]
+5
I'd Just Like To Interject
You can't help but interrupt people to go on pedantic tirades.
-1.5
Oriental
You always know which way is East.
-5
Collin's Key
A thumnalium key which oozes a scintillating mystery slime...[144]
-1
A Nerf N-Force Stonewall Shield
-4
Slept On
Your starting island has a king size bed on it with comfortable blankets and pillows. There is a small chance of having a Class Q nightmare when you sleep on it or sleep using any dissassembled parts from it.
-1
So Much More Room for Activities
It is now a bunk bed
-1
Settling The Score
All Water Damage, Wind Damage, Fire Damage, Stone Damage, Wood Damage, Nature Damage, Ice Damage, Energy Damage, Light Damage, Dark Damage, Bacon Damage, Metal Damage, Silver Damage, Poison Damage, Disease Damage, ??? Damage, Fear Damage, Curse Damage, Good Damage, Evil Damage, and Null Damage is now rounded up to the nearest whole number.
-1
Just Needs S'mores
Your starting island comes with an illusory campfire! Provides light but no heat. SORCERER GENERAL'S WARNING: Prolonged exposure to illusion magic can have negative health consequences.
+5
Oasis
Islands may now spawn with lakes that contain faux-water that causes immediate intracranial hemorrhaging when ingested
+10
Crack Shipping
Any item you order will now be delivered by kobolds under the influence of addictive narcotic substances, thusly your item may not be delivered to your exact location or come in one piece. (+3 Buyer Beware)
-101
Your father's grimoire
He told you to never touch this, but maybe just this once... (-1 Ach)
+99
I Can't Breathe
All oxygen is now carbon dioxide.
-1
The Sculptor
Gargoyles are now less hostile.[145]
-1
Wizards of Worldly Place
You receive an admission to the Mogwarts Magical Academy for Gifted Children located 0.934 megameters directly southwest of your starting island.
+3.5
...
You can now only speak in ellipses.
-1
Stargazer
You can see an exact numerical representation of the Fame of any entity you look at
-1
An already-deployed parachute
-1
Eduardo Godoy
He has grown as a person and no longer carries toxoplasmosis.
-1
Pervy Mage
You frequently get nosebleeds. (+4 Wis)
-1
Onmyojisan
Your right nostril bleeds cherubumor and your left nostril bleeds Tartarian bile. (+1 Wis, +1 Dark Wis, +0.01 Curse)
-1
SANS-!
Sans is now standing in your island, has one line of dialogue.
-1
Anodized aluminum kerambit
-1
Vibe Check Passed
(+1 Aura)
-15
Remnants of the Presence
Glowing cyan stones which are warm to the touch will spawn for 3 minutes in random areas at random times. Picking one up makes it disappear and adds 1 to your collected count. Every 100 collected spawns a Rare lootbox. Every 1,000 collected spawns a Mega Rare lootbox and increases your Obscure by 1. Every 10,000 collected spawns an Epic Lootbox and gives you a Strange Vision. After the first 100,000 are collected, the Paradise event occurs. Surviving will grant you access to 1 hidden item. (+1 Unraveling)
+8
Think (About What You've Done)
Whenever you kill something, you must relive its life in real time.[146]
-1
To The Secret Lair!
Your starting tree now has a secret door on it concealing a chute to the bottom of your island.
-1
You-May Nicky
A friendly Koala bear named Nicky that encourages your every action and attempts to grant you psychological permission for every action you have hesitance to take. Nicky will never do actions for you.
-1
Strategist's Toolbox
A set of 100 green, 100 blue, and 100 red plastic army men and 1x1 meter roll up plastic mat with a black and white chessboard pattern.
-120
GameFAQs
A shoddy solar-powered tablet that allows you to post to and read threads on Worldchan's "Random" board.[147]
-1
Aw Crud
You become 10x faster at creating simple web applications
-6.5
Happy Tree Friends
A colony of Dökkálfar now live in your starting tree.
+30
You are made out of glass
If you trip or bump into anything you will shatter and die immediately (+25 Fragility)
-1
A bed of nails
-1
Free At Last, Free At Last
You are no longer black
-1
Fast Travel
Immediately teleport to any island you're about to die on
+10
Annoying Nigger
Constantly talks while you try to think[-13]
+13.37
Alice & Bob
Everything you say or write is encrypted using an AES-128 ECB block cipher. You are given a plastic card with your 128-bit key printed on it. (+1 Robot Affinity)[148]
-1
Learn To Code
You have perfect knowledge of HTML (+3 Robot Alignment)
-1
Negahistamine
Permanently cure all of your food allergies.
-1
20 clearpills
+10
Dungeons And World Dragons
You now need to roll for initiative before doing anything. Enemies will wait their turn but not let you try again if you fail.
+15
Adam Savage
Every 13 days you get the overwhelming urge to rape. Committing rape during this time will permanently turn you into a jellied being. (+10 Dark Point)
-100
The N Word
A word so powerful it can kill anything (besides the World Dragon). Can only be used once.
-15
My Precious...
Every ring in the 'Verse now has stat bonuses, but the bonuses only apply if you have proposed to a woman or man with a ring of identical or near identical make (he/she/it has to say yes.) Stat bonuses depend on the race of your spouse.
-1
Rise And Grind
A skateboard.
-1
Promise Ring
An onion ring that gives you a flashbulb memory of the moment you consume it fully.
-12
My Stash
Your chest is now a metal safe with a combination lock.
-3
You know the combination to your chest.
-1
Better Help
You've now received the equivalent of 10 years worth of professional mental health counseling
-1
Redundant And Unneeded
Frost Dragons are added to The 'Verse
-1
Balance Patch
Frost Dragons are now more numerous in order to counter overfarming of their resources.
-1
LitRPG
Lvl up! Your username and level now float above your head.
0
All Just A...
Upon defeating the World Dragon, you will suddenly wake up, revealing everything that happened was a dream. (Free, but disappointing)
-50
Oh. My. God.
When you wake up, Gandalf bursts into your room asking you to go on an epic quest with him.
-1
Good Things Come to Those Who Wait
On the small desk beside your bed sits a new Nintendo handheld game console that you don't recognize. Next to it, a note reads: "Happy Birthday, my little son". You suddenly notice a small game card attached to the note. Its label art depicts a blue summer sky and a title: "オトメファンクション〜待てば海路の日和あり〜"
-1
Two 5 meter by 0.5 meter strips of cheesecloth.
+5
Alpha Syndrome
You must look at digital screens for at least an hour a day or your sanity quickly begins to slip.[149]
-1
(Still) So Sorry
Your OC will become canon in the 'Verse! (-1000 Dollars)
-1
Heavy News
A roll of newspaper that weighs 1 Megagram
-45
Green Thumb
Feeding your starting tree the thumbs of ensouled plant and earth-aligned creatures increases the rate of growth of anything it produces.[150]
-10
Wrap-Around
The 'Verse is now a finite 3-torus. Careful what you wish for!
-666
Teh Penguin Of Doom
Your set of DoomKnight armor (if you own one) from your DragonFable account is transferred to The 'Verse.
-1
The Old Man Lost His Horse
+10
Long Dream
Every dream you have increases the average length of your dreams by 7%.
-1
Sodium
You start with a 1m³ block of pure elemental sodium, containment apparatus not included.
+15
But Nobody Came
Sexual reproduction is now impossible for any beings in the universe. All sexual functions and associated feelings no longer work[151]
-1
A wifebeater shirt that reads "WHO FARTED?"
-1
Bless This Mess
Snoopy spawns on your island in 10 years[152]
+33
Gambler's Certainty
Completely random events now have a higher chance of occurring as time goes on.
-1
Endless Storage
Your starting chest is bottomless.
-1
Total Recall
You can remember anything that happened in the past 24 hours with perfect clarity.
-1
Eye Of The Storm
Wykfir's Greater Maelstrom now takes 2 fewer ticks to cast. (+1 Div)
-1
100 single-use plastic bags dating from before The Fall
-10
Mini Me
You can now split yourself in half to create 2 clones which are half the size of your normal self, both of which you control. You can merge these clones back together if they're touching. Each clone has halved stats.[153][154][155]
-25
Personal Army
You can now perform Mini Me cloning recursively.
-1
The Littlest Mermaid
Whalekin are no longer healthy at all sizes
+10
Basic Package
Ad breaks play every 10 minutes
-15
Premium Package
Ad breaks no longer play
-1
Your starting island's surface is covered in a 20cm thick layer of liquid bitumen
-1
A picture of a Terrablade printed out on a paper dinner plate.
+1
Your lucky day!
+6.5
Ransomware
Several not-strictly-necessary but good-to-have mental skills (eg numeracy, face recognition, knowledge of dog breeds) that you have are now encrypted by an unknown 64-bit secret key. You have a USB port in the back of your head where you can connect and try to input the correct key.
-1
Freshman's Dream
(x + y)2 now equals x2 + y2
-1
Vindicated
Various conspiracies you've always believed before you came to The 'Verse all turn out to be true.[156]

Make A Wish
A 7 meter diameter, 10 meter tall, non-functional decorative fountain made of stone is added to the southwest side of your island, supported by Star Material. It contains 4,209 coins from various countries.

Dark Starter Pack
(+10 Dark, +1 Str, -3 Int, +1 on Kinsey scale)
+1
Solomon's Lock
It is now impossible for you to have sex with Demonic type creatures
-8

-1

-1
Urban Decay
All buildings now have those ugly brown stains on them and there's crumbling concrete everywhere
-15
Urbanite

Anhedonic
You can no longer feel happiness (+15 Holy Point, +2 End, +1 Obscure)
-8
Fair Fight
The World Dragon refrains from using instant death abilities until phase 3.

Sandman's Blessing
For every hour you spend asleep, 4 milligrams of titanium ore dust (TiO2) accumulates in the corners of each of your eyes.
-1
Djinn & Tonic
A lamp which summons a mystical entity when rubbed which will grant you a 4/5ths-full 16oz disposable cup of tonic water with extra quinine. This can only be done three times, and the lamp evaporates instantly upon the third cup’s materialization.
-16
Epstein Island
Gain a savvy new bunker underneath your island.
-50
_
Your Animal Crossing island appears behind you (-100 miles back). There are no inhabitants.

For The Kids
Your starting tree now has a tire swing attached.[158]
-1
No Regrets
You become unaging as long as you don't think about how old you are. If you ever think about how old you are, you suddenly become the correct age.
-1
Mike Jests
You are now tuned in to an infinite stream of famous Let's Player MikePlays! You are tuned in with your Mind's Ear, you can't mute it.[159]
-1
BombsUp
You can now send Twitch emotes psychically to MikePlays
-33
The Trip Nnemonic
MikePlays is killed and replaced with MikeNnemonic, and your Mind's Sight is now unlocked. All of the regulars of his stream are now perceivable ghosts in your vision and will watch with you.

All members of the Radioactive Uber Clan materialize within The 'Verse and will aid you on your journey.

This Is Very Bad
Many YouTube channels experience unexpected view count drops due to YouTube cracking down on bots and setting Restricted Mode on for user accounts by default.

Inflation rates around The 'Verse approach levels comparable to Weimar Germany or America under Joe Biden.

When I'm Bored

Start Doing This

Heroic Dose

-3
NoSleep
You now no longer need to sleep, though you can if you wish.
+5
Drought
It hasn't rained in what seems like forever, and the sun is beating down on The 'Verse hard. Could it be the World Dragon's doing? All crops must be watered manually, and they die three times as fast without water. Races whose economies depend on agriculture will be poorer, and more desperate as a result.

Featherweight

-1
Side Quest
Do you remember the story of the 6 Great Champions?
Geither, the wisest of the Elfs; Marbaran, the eldest of the Vampires; Xu-Bisi, the most intelligent of the Greys; Kippa, the richest of the Goblins; Tyrone, the strongest of the Orcs; and Jimmy, the luckiest Human.
2,700 years ago they surmounted the Three Glorious Challenges and won fame for themselves throughout all of The 'Verse. The legends of their exploits are still told, but...
Recently Marbaran has resurfaced. He claims he is not the only one left alive: Jimmy lives, and he has begun to be a mighty one in The 'Verse.
Jimmy has enslaved an island of Demi Brood and Gays and seems to be making plans to resurrect the others. His goal is unknown, but Marbaran thinks he is seeking to raise a mighty army to take on "The Invading Islander"...

Keyring of keys shaped like fish

A life-size marble statue of Kim Dotcom is added to your island

Plus, the experience might be valuable -- and hey, maybe if you do a good enough job maybe he'll recommend you to other Fell Mages!

The FanDuel "Step Your Game Up" Stat Tracker
Make this the Run with the FanDuel "Step Your Game Up" Stat Tracker. Whether you're admiring how many gems you've amassed, gloating over how many goblins you've slain, or taking a quick peek at your Chr before you crack a corny pick up line, the FanDuel "Step Your Game Up" Stat Tracker has functionality for every kind of adventurer.[226]

Gambler's Fallacy
Using your FanDuel account, you can now bet any of your stats (except Lck) on any challenging situation you're in that uses them. The odds and payout will automatically be calculated. During that time, you will be deprived of that stat by the amount you bet.
-1
Your starting tree now grows 1 can of Pepsi Green per month
+3
Bigger On The Inside
You become worse at estimating volume.
-8
Berserker
Your Str is multiplied by (1 + your blood alcohol content).
-5
End Game Content
All creatures and fauna now have a 0.05% chance of dropping a cute, servile pet-version of themselves!
-1
Earth Bet
There are now 2 Lumbricus terrestris on your starting island.
-50
Galaxy Gas
You can now breathe in outer space. (+10 Communion)[229]
-50
+
-
-1 Norwood Level (can be taken multiple times)
-35
Yggdrasil
Your starting tree has a 5x larger diameter and is 100x as tall
-10
Only Up
Your starting tree gets a ladder installed on it
-15
Overgrowth
Your starting tree's diameter is 7x wider and it now has large branches regularly, some of which would be large enough to stand upon.
-5
Secret Clubhouse
A shitty, cramped, sloppily-built treehouse is added somewhere in your starting tree.

Mechanical Keyboard
You hear the keypresses after each action you take.
-1

They're Xbox 360 controller noises instead.

DualShock
They're PS4 controller noises instead, with occasional vibrations.

Lobster cuirass
-1
You become bald.

-50
Broken Going Into Games Machine
Severely damaged from overuse, requires extensive repairs.
+5
Nothing Without The Fans
Do you have an awesome fanwork about Neue CYOA: Deux? Email it to icouldbeany1@proton.me and enter the redemption code you receive as a reply in the field below to get 5 FREE points!
ENTER REDEMPTION CODE BELOW!
-35
Sick Stunts
A 20 meter by 20 meter concrete BMX park is added to the west end of your island. There is a sewer underneath it (stretching 10 meters down) infested with Weeping Hellslimes, Tube Men, and a single Leviathan Gator. (+1 Style, +1 Adrenaline)
-1
Remove all termites from the starting tree.
-1
Add carpenter ants to the starting tree
-1
A swollen laptop battery
It can be used in combat to discharge all its energy at once.
-1
Gainful Employment
You are immediately given job at the nearest dust factory as soon as you find it.
+1
Never Open The Green Door No Matter What You Hear
On your first day at the dust factory, your supervisor will give you a strange set of rules... (+1 Terror, +1 Intrigue, +1 Hidden)
-1
SuperSpecial
The color of your eyes changes based on your mood
-1
Wood You Mind
Your starting tree can think![230]
-1
Ghost Dad
Ghosts are now attracted to uninhabited graves.
-1
50 shattered Prince Rupert's drops.
-1
Supreme Gentleman
Chivalry is now more respected all throughout The 'Verse.
-1
Magical Realism
A small gland is added next to your bladder that produces tiny quantities of pixie dust. (+1 Mystic)[231]
-1
A pound of ambergris
-1
I Put On My Robe and Wizard Hat
You get a robe and wizard hat
-1
You can freely convert low-sodium soy sauce to normal soy sauce and vice versa[232]
-1
Amphibia
Aquatic creatures are now 500% more common.
-1
You are allowed to watch unlimited nostalgia compilation videos customized for you in your mind's eye.
Every time you watch one, you feel a memory slipping... (-1 memory per view)
-1
Spotify® #SpreadTheWord Sweepstakes
You get entered to win a lifetime of Spotify® Premium if you've read the Spotify® Corrections and take this choice!
-30
Slime Processor
A machine you can dump slimes into to make edible material from their remains. The material's texture and flavor are undesirable.
-1
A standard wooden pallet.
-10
Wubba Lubba dub-dub!
You become as smart as Rick Sanchez for 1 week
-1
Blessing of GabeN
There is a Steam sale right when you spawn.

Strawman
You can now summon illusory copies of other beings only for the purpose of pretending to beat them up.
-1
Invoke Prejudice
Increase the GC (Global Consciousness) on an island, increasing the chances of a random event between the races of The 'Verse.[233]
-1
Peerless
No one will ever be the same age as you
-1
Lego Island
Your starting island is now made of legos.

If Only You Could Talk To The Monsters
Monsters' verbal abuse will now be more vicious and personal
-1
A large bag of cheddar chex mix, but the food inside has inverted colors
-1
Parabolic Conduit
You become inwardly more convex. (+20% receptiveness to all Eether and Void transmitted Majyks)
-1
A set of 16 0.75 oz food coloring bottles
-1
Coward's Way Out
A disposable zip gun with a single bullet. Any being killed by the bullet will have a pre-death hallucination where they spend 10 subjective years in the setting of Duck Dodgers as their own original character.
-1
A faithful replica of Timmy Turner's fishbowl
-1
Knowledge Of The Ancients
You now can now perfectly recognize and name all rave stabs and their sources.

Allergies
You now have a random elemental weakness
-2

Pen Island

-1
1kg of tofu, and 1kg of gelatin mixed with sawdust and white mold.
Both are in unlabelled containers.

No Zap

Our Hero

Leader of the Pack

Barbie

New York Times Omniversal Subscription

A flexible pole that can only be used for pole vaulting and slightly grows in length as you become stronger

Far Out, Dude!

No Map

-10
Moving Plans
3 pieces of US Letter sized 5mm graph paper labelled "X", "Y", and "Z" and a special green pencil with eraser. Each horizontal box length is equal to 0.25 meters. Each vertical box length is equal to one second. Drawing a connected line that moves upward and to the left or right on any of the pieces of paper (or on any combination of them) will, after you add a checkmark to one of the pieces of paper and wait 3 seconds, translate your body along that trajectory over time. Can be reused if old markings are erased.[236]
-10
Tournament Arc
You now have a map to the World Arena (+1 Potential)
+8
Attack of Titans
Titans are permanently hostile to you. Locks you out of the Yearly Festival and the Basketball Stadium will not spawn. (-INF Titan Alignment, +0.5 Dark Point)

Omega Kek!
Pepe joins you for a year of fun!
-1
WidePeepoHappy
Peepo comes along!

Middling

Boomer

Flower Power

-20
4 toy flags
Planting one in the ground will claim a 5 metre x 5 metre square of land with the flag at its center. This effect extends infinitely along the y-axis. The demarcated area will have anti-griefing measures enabled. Removing the flag from the square will nullify the effect and cause it to turn to dust. (CAUTION: Characters possessing the Hacker trait and certain powerful entities can bypass the effect.)

Pro Choice

Adventurer's Cap
A replica of King Graham's hat from King's Quest

Only a Spoonful
You start with an average sized spoon. Anything consumed by the player must be first decanted into the spoon or scooped up by it. If the spoon is lost or broken, nothing can be consumed.

Goatsy

Age Of Cultivation
You can now participate in The 'Verse's unique Cultivation system, advancing to the ranks of Warped Dragonkin, Demi-Sage, or even World Guardian. You may cycle your Vital Aura, Mana, Blood, Mind Vapor, and Soul Sand into a foundational Path that meets your needs, and improve yourself gradually. However be warned, many creatures harbor this knowledge as well, and may be much stronger than you...

Moist Critical
+25% critical hit chance on enemies that are wet.
-30
Arithmancy
Carrying or wearing a certain number of an item will increase a corresponding stat by +1, +3, +5, or x1.25.
2, 20, 24, 100: Chr
3, 18, 26, 111: Dex
4, 16, 30, 99: End
5, 15, 33, 145: Str
6, 17, 34, 321: Spd
7, 14, 28, 777: Lck
8, 12, 101, 999: Int
9, 11, 23, 666: Ach
10, 19, 37, 333: Wis[258][259][260]
-5
Pythagorean
If you repeat any of the base numbers out loud several times in a row, you get a small (+2.5% after other buffs) boost to that stat for a few seconds[261]
-5
Sacred Geometry
If you wear something with a depiction of a regular polygon with a number of vertices equal to the base number of a stat, you get a small (+1% after other buffs) boost to the corresponding stat[262]
