An office setup with a desk, chair, and pieces of cardboard painted like computer accessories (monitor, keyboard, and mouse) bridges between your island and the satellite island.
The foundations are wood and decently stable, but it is not supported by Star Material.
-1
The floor is carpeted.
-1
The chair is more ergonomic.

Your office now has a "punk" theme.

Justice

Cool Spot

Protect and Serve
You start wearing a police uniform and are equipped with a badge, handgun, a single clip of ammo, and handcuffs. Every day you get an additional clip of ammo and pair of handcuffs. You must always obey local laws or you will be suspended and stop receiving ammo and handcuff shipments. You can now only take down monsters and sapient creatures with non-lethal force. Using lethal force will lower your alignment with all factions (except dire dwarfs) by 75. In addition, you will no longer receive bullets or handcuffs and your handgun will evaporate. (+10 Law)[278]

Public Transmit
The 'Verse Express is now ready for operation! A series of subway stations can be found across the void that will take you to other stations you have already visited at a reasonable price of 1 Rarium gem per mile. Be careful, though—you're not the only one trying to get somewhere! All types of creatures will be riding alongside you, and they might not be too friendly. Watch out for the "Chikan Express" that has a 1/10 chance (1/2 on Hard Mode) to spawn instead of a normal train![297]

Gone Fishing
The Trans-Dimensional Bureaucracy has decreed that All carp, bass, cod, plaice, monkfish, shark, whale, tillapia, herring, sardine, anchovy, halibut, red snapper, swordfish, salmon, kippers, oysters, mussels, geoducks, football fish, flatfish, catfish, dogfish, sturgeon, tuna, shrimp, crab, lobster, squid, octopus, cuttlefish, barnacle, bobbit worm, dolphin, manatee, porpoise, dugong, sea turtle, gar, oarfish, lionfish, fugu fish, pufferfish, blobfish, kraken, mermaid, sea anemone, coral, sea cucumber, sea slug, starfish, sponge, angler fish, eel, and coelacanth be put under a spell of invisibility that can only be purged by purchasing a repurchasable 24-hour license for 12000 frog skins. You may try to catch these invisible fish without a license but if you are found to be doing so by a Warden they will attempt to take you into custody and force you to pay 20x the value of the fish you caught, otherwise they will send a continuous wave of Enforcers to put a stop to your actions. (+50 Fishing, +100 Attraction to Mermaids, Sirens, and other Aquatic Demonesses, +1000 Persecution Zeitgeist)

Atlas

Necrobump
Without consuming any grey mana, you may control corpses under 250kg with your thoughts if you have a direct line of sight and are pointing at them with a finger. If they are no longer within your line of sight or being pointed at, corpses will return to their original state after 5 seconds. Corpses are not very strong, fast, or dextrous, but will perform your commands to the best of their ability. Corpses cannot perform commands that would require knowledge or skills you do not possess.[304]

Bugging Out

-1
Beseech the aid of Dominus Hostiarum, Lord of Exchange
Scholars of the Third Empire recount tales of explorers who ventured beyond the Archipelago to contact the Alfin folk, whose numerous quirks were documented extensively in post-classical literature. Standing out among these are tales of the Alfin patron God Hostiarum, a capricious figure of dubious divinity who seemed to be the missing link explaining why Alves had slightly higher stats than expected for their level. Alves traditionally contacted their God through ritual ceremonies performed each year. Alves in their 12th year made an offering which symbolized their coming-of-age. After the offerings were made a great feast followed, which always included a weird strong tasting red sauce with chunks in it.

While the requirements of dealings with Dominus Hostiarum are rather particular and not known to many outside of scholars and the Alves themselves, the underlying concept of exchange is widely understood and could be considered a natural law. To receive; one must first give. The tension between the conflicting interests of each party forms the basis of a negotiation. Indeed, omnieconomic theory suggests that asymmetric trade can satisfy comparative advantages even between men and Gods. But before all that, negotiators must establish trust for a good faith exchange to occur. Those who would bargain with Dominus Hostiarum are advised to offer generously; the Lord may not refund offerings deemed insufficiently worthy. Few non-Alf commune with Dominus Hostiarum, so caution and perhaps additional offerings are recommended if you possess no Alf ancestry. Among men of letters this should remain unsaid, but under no circumstances ought one attempt to defraud a God. Folklore popular among Alves suggests that when provoked Dominus Hostiarum has been known to disregard His characteristic love for exchange entirely, taking far more than was offered in exchange for the boon of mercy from His wrath.

To begin, find a large knife or small saw. Test it on an animal carcass (or unsuspecting victim) first to make sure it's capable of cutting sinew and bone. Speak the incantation below 3 times while submerging it in a bowl filled with your own blood (necessary to cover carrier fees). Your ritual tool will join you in the 'Verse.
"Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur. Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum."
Once the ritual tool has been blessed, it will remain active for up to an hour, depending on how accurately the ritual was performed. With the tool in hand, speak your offering. Before speaking the final line to request your boon, remove the offering from your body and place it in the bowl of blood. Below are provided a selection of the most common sacrifices used by young Alf. Offering multiple gifts is common, and multiple sacrifices will stack as expected. Dominus Hostiarum, Lord of Exchange is rumored to offer volume pricing discounts of up to 10% when many gifts are offered at once, although reports conflict. There may also be coupons if you search aline midst the Intraley.

My Finger: "Our Lord of Exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, please accept this digit. Severed at the third knuckle, it could provide a charming toy for any of Your countless Children in the Heavens or perhaps occupy the maw of a Pet. In return for this offering, this subject would humbly ask that he receives +0.1 Dex."
My Foot: "Our Lord of Exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, please accept this foot. It might serve excellently as a doorstop or perhaps a paperweight in Your Divine Palace in the Heavens. In return for this offering, this subject would humbly ask that he receives +1 Spd, or perhaps 1.5 if you're feeling generous."
My Mucilage Gland: "Our Lord of Exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, please accept this mucilage gland. The lasting mark of an blessing You Yourself offered our ancestors centuries hence, following our forced departure from the once-verdant Forests of Solinia, this gift is a true expression of the bond between the Alves and our Lord. In return for this offering, this subject would humbly ask that he receives +1 Wis."
My Skin: "Our Lord of Exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, please accept this skin. May it shield Your back from discomfort as the whip strikes mine harder. In return for this offering, this subject would humbly ask that he receives +1 Con."
My Tongue: "Our Lord of Exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, please accept this tongue. May it comparatively amplify Your edicts in proportion to my silence. Mm mmmm m mmmmn mmn nmmm m mmn."
My Blended Hand: "Our Lord of Exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, please accept this puréed palm, pulped with blades sharp enough to shatter the intricate bones of the wrist. Supervised by a blending coordinator, I have mixed also diverse traditions to provide You this syncretic delicacy which You might drink, or refrigerate to drink later. In return for this offering, this subject would humbly ask that he receives +1 Ach."
My Eyes: "Spare me, for I have sinned against You, my Lord. Take these false eyes, which I have no further need for, to flavor Your stew and warm the bellies of your Children in the Heavens. In return for this offering, this wretched liar would humbly ask that he receives his life."
My Head: "Our Lord of Exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, please accept my head. Take me at once, and look favorably upon the exchanges of my peers."
Or make up your own offering?: Get creative! But be careful...

The Fine Print: Conditional on his acceptance of any exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, Lord of Exchange will reap your soul upon your first death, triggering instantaneous Truedeath. Whether your soular essence will sup with Him in an Afterlife or simply be devoured is unknown, as even the Archipelago's greatest magific minds have yet to confirm what lies beyond the veil.[310][-17]
+12
Knightmare
A Death Knight now rides atop the World Dragon
-100
Nike Maxsight contact lens
+7
Death Drive
Minor injuries or emotional upset may trigger you to have self-harm tantrums.

Colbert Rapport
You befriend White People easier but you start speaking ebonics
-1
All Bark, Some Bite
Your starting tree has a mouth and can eat! He's hungry!
-87
Legendary
You gain the ability to turn into a narrow beam of light. When you hit a reflective surface, you rematerialise at that location. You lose sanity proportional to the amount of light that is diffracted or scattered by air or smoke. If you hit a diffuse surface, you die.
-22
Blood On The Dance Floor
Your Str and Dex are increased by x1.25 when dancing.
-1
We Heard You Like CYOAs
Magical printer that prints out randomly generated CYOA images. Can only be used twice per day.
-1
Lizard in a jar
-1
Gogurt Black (dangerous)
-1
How Many Licks...?
A 1-carat rough diamond at the center of a ball bearing made of polonium-210.
-1
Art of the Deal
Certain factions now accept your Stat Points as currrency.
-1
Johnny Encore
You are more attractive but female creatures dislike you (+2 Chr, +0.5 Str, -1.5 Foid Alignment)
-43
Grow Your Own Methamphetamine Crystals Kit
For kids 12 and up. Includes distillation apparatus.[311]

Dalle's Despair
One half-full wine glass, one full wine glass, one empty wine glass, and eight bottles of wine.
+2
Survival Horror
You now move using tank controls
-1
Blood Eels now sometimes drop gyral powder
-1
I Could Be Nobody
You are now more careful, private, and discrete (+10 Anonimity, +10 Stealth)
+20
Totally Spies
World Dragon-aligned spies will now periodically stalk you and attempt to sabotage your efforts.
-1
Ghost World
Ghosts now make positive contributions to society and the economy.
-1
Oddly Satisfying
Torturing dwarfs is now more pleasurable (+1 Dark)
-1
The Thinker
You must speak only in questions. Every consecutive question asked will increase your Thoughtfulness Score, causing all NPCs to be increasingly impressed by and willing to consider your questions. Breaking your streak reverts your Thoughtfulness Score to a negative level, causing anyone addressed to be excessively dismissive of anything you say until your Score becomes positive again.[312]
-3
Offscreen Spikes
A 200x200 meter plane of metal spikes floats 2km below your island (supported by Star Material). These spikes are made of a metal which causes instant death when it cuts the flesh of most humanoid creatures. The spikes are 0.35 meters tall and 0.2 meters thick.[344]
-1
All-Seeing
When you blink, you experience the sensations of a Boltzmann brain and eyes that form somewhere random in the void and then is uncreated when you open your eyes.
-1
Your starting tree now grows 1 watermelon per month
-1
Psychokokhlazis
You can control the direction carbonation bubbles rise toward for all soft drinks within 100 meters of you.
-1
5 Simpsons-themed shot glasses
-1
Red Never Fails Me
Your strength and endurance increase by 1.5% if you're wearing something red

Newspeak
All gems are now coal.

A JDLB Worm Gearbox

Casual Friday

Xiaolin Showdown

I'm A Gaming God

That Really Is Something

Plan 9

Deck Builder

CARE

Majutsu Mania

It's Giving

2 silkworm eggs

Socratic Method
Asking too many invasive questions will make NPCs attempt to murder you.
-1
Infinite Jester
A court jester may be summoned on command to entertain you. If his jokes are not to your liking, you may banish him for a short period of time, but every time he is resummoned after being banished his resentment meter will slowly fill up by a good chunk. When his resentment meter is full he will accost you with every tool at his disposal. If you manage to kill him, he will come back with his resentment meter empty, which will refill upon further banishments.
-6
Lamp Oil, Rope, Bombs
You get a jug of lamp oil, a single rope, and a stick of dynamite
-100
Rays of Gold

Mind Game
You need to actively think about any of your actions in order to execute them.

Gear Up

Dragon Born
The World Dragon is now your father. Nothing else about you is different.[343]
-1
It Come With Egg Roll
Insectoid races now eat more palatable food like kimchi, rice, dumplings, etc.
-1
Tutorial Island
Your starting island now has a reference manual containing a copy of this CYOA + some extra commentary
-1
Purification
Unsightly creatures like Goblins, Orcs, Ghouls, Dinosaurs, and Insectoids no longer exist in The 'Verse. However, hostile Light creatures such as White Wraiths, Sand Pixies, Ice Titans, and Star Beings will be more numerous.
-1
First One's Free
All shops offer a 20% discount after you steal one item from them. The standard punishment for theft is now cutting off a limb.
-5
Epic Drops
Majiska-Unlocked Tier 70 weapons are more common. Blessed Metal and Cursed Ivory weapons become conditionally rarer/commoner based on your starting alignments.
-30
A magic urinal is installed on your starting island.

A PS5
-1
Fur Affinity
Cows drop more leather.

Give It Back When You're Done And Write Grandpa A Thank You Card

-1
Your island has a puddle!
-20
A circular saw
WARNING: It does not have the safety feature from the video where it stops automatically if you put your finger or a sausage next to the blade while it's running.
-1
Ashes to Ashes, Dust to Dust
All materia can now be converted into itself with random slightly altered characteristics at the quantum level
-1
Moral Genius

No Impediments

10 clothes pins

??? Starter Pack

-1
Sword of Damocles

-25
Your starting tree has an udder that you can squeeze to get 2 cups of whole milk daily
-1
All The Fallen
Everything that falls continuously for more than 85.570 hours in the void will be translated into The Nowhere. (+3 Obscure)
-15
Who You Gonna Call?
A Gnomic steam-powered hand-sized Spirit Essence collector.
+5
It's Not Unusual
Long tail events of all kinds are now more common.
-10
Rent-Free
Your starting island now has a 2 bed, 2 bath two-storey house floating at the south edge. Its dimensions are 7 x 16 x 9 meters. Doesn't come with appliances or furniture. Heating, plumbing, and electricity exist but aren't connected to anything. You must pay off your 400,000 gem mortgage within 3 years or the house will be repossessed by Low Frequency Autopoietic Entities ("Whistlers"), who will also begin to hunt you.
-2
End the Fed
Hooray! Cryptocurrency now has physical form! All whole number amounts of coins you possessed before entering the 'Verse spawn in your pant pockets. They are comparable in size to United States 50¢ coins and weigh twice as much! All coins are made of lead and embossed with their respective cryptocurrency logo. (+7 Mercantilism)[349]
-10
Fully Remote Island Enhanced Navigation Device
Upon visiting your first new island, your starter island will teleport to your location and float alongside you for the remainder of your run. It moves slightly slower than you and will leave one foot of space between it and you when coming to a stop. If you enter a building or any enclosed space without suitable clearance for the island, it will push against the blockage with a force that grows the further away from it you are until either the blockage gives or you exit. If you attempt to climb onto the island, please note that the island will continue to try to keep its distance from you, potentially resulting in some very inconvenient outcomes.
-15
Misery Loves Company
Your Str increases for every miserable sapient creature within 10 km of you or which can be considered under your dominion. Sadness increases it by 0.1 per creature, stress increases it by 0.2 per creature, fatigue increases it by 0.3 per creature, pain increases it by 0.4 per creatures, and suicidal ideation increases it by 1 per creature.
-1
Broke
You start with no gold (+1.5 End)
-1
A smoking hot babe spawns on your island.[350]
-1
Retro
Your vision gains a stylish pixel CRT shader.
-1
(╯°□°）╯︵ ┻━┻
Your current island is flipped upside down. WARNING: Gravitational pull is not flipped.
-10
Wilsay Wolay... Wolotare?
You now know the magic words to open a gate to Grandpa's Secret Place. If only you had the key...
-1
Shortstack
You gain a stack of pancakes as a companion
-50
A phoenix egg
A phoenix has a natural lifespan of 100 years, after which it will return to its dormant egg form for 100 years. It is trainable and can fetch objects and start fires.[351]
-1
The Nut's Shack
A tiny doll house filled with 30 lugnuts of various sizes and shapes
-1
A well materializes near your current location.
Dubious moans and scraping sounds can be heard emanating deep from within.[352]
-1
You are renowned throughout The 'Verse for your amazing musical talent
(+2 Rep)
-1
Gamer Dent
You develop microcephaly, but become 1.10x better at multiplayer video games.
+3
Spur Gout
Horses hate being touched and will refuse to let you ride on them.
-1
A randomized 2D acrylic stand of a character from japanese media
(+20 Pointlessness)
-1
Swagged Out
A Yogscast t-shirt
-1
A bulky and extremely heavy crt television, every channel except for PBS and WB contains a heavy amount of static
(+Veg Out)
-5
Explosive Crossbow
A modern crossbow that comes loaded with a single explosive bolt that can not be removed. When the trigger is pulled the crossbow explodes. Prank your friends.
+15
BejeweledBejeweled
Gems now disappear if there are 3 or more of the same kind touching each other.[353]
+5
Gems now despawn if left uncollected for 5 seconds.Gems now despawn if left uncollected for 5 seconds.
-1
Skillcape
You get an epic cape whenever you master a specific skill
-1
Maxed
When you master all possible skills, get an even more epic cape.
-2
Next Gen
You gain access to nusleep (+INF Wakefulness)
-25
Another Man's Treasure Island
An 15x15x10 meter craterous island filled with piles of rotting organic garbage and plastic trash floats slightly to the south and slightly under your island. A yellow plastic tube slide installed on your island leads directly to it
-100
True Pacifist
The World Dragon can be spared. (+5 Goodness)
-1
RTFM
Lootboxes may now contain retro game manuals.
-1
You get a flash drive containing all of Eric Harris' Doom WADs.
(+5 Righteous Anger)
+3
The Golden Rule
You are incapable of making moral judgments about others' actions (+10 Neutral)
-1
My Beautiful Dark Twisted Fantasy
Your favorite OC comes to life and spawns on the starting island with you. It has incurable late stage cancer that has metastasized to every major organ in its body. It can hardly move or speak. It will live for 3 days if left unharmed.[354][355][356][357][358][359]
-3
A hospital bed is provided.
-1
A children's alphabet block made of lead
-1
Penis Island
Your island comes with a penis[360]
+4
Player Killer
Killing any 'Verse citizen that has rights under their local law will place a skull over your head that disappears after 24 hours. Everyone knows what this means.
-1
Accelerationism
Your running speed doubles for every 30 seconds you're running. You cannot choose to go slower unless you come to a full stop.
-1
A non-programmable 0.5 x 0.25 meter 32 x 16 red dot matrix led display which requires no power
Words and phrases will constantly scroll by which are demeaning or degrading personal attacks on whoever is looking at it.
+3
Thief's Lament
You cannot pick locks.
-1
Just What I Needed!
Hitting blocks with your head now produces low-tier currency such as stone coins, copper dust, or fresh chitin. Low-tier power-ups like Steel Mushrooms have a 0.1% chance of spawning.[361][362]
-1
You can shoot lasers from your hand but choosing to do so will instantaneously annihilate it
-1
You Get What You Fucking Deserve
FRED is transferred to The 'Verse and is gangraped by a bunch of orcs and then beaten to death.
+4
Diss Cord
You can only speak in Tenor Gifs
+8
Slay
You can only speak in Tenor Gifs of black people
+3
The Devious Jester
You will be subjected to a randomly selected DeviantArt fetish at the beginning of each day until the King is sufficiently amused.
-6
Handmade Hero
All your personal stats (except Int) start at zero, but you gain stats 100% faster[363]
-333
Phoenix Up
Unique magical artifact. Capable of reviving a single ally from "DEATH". One time use.
-25

+20
Social Distancing
An outbreak occurs resulting in a deadly virus infecting all creatures throughout The 'Verse. Don't get within 6 feet of anyone or you'll get infected as well!
-19
Cured
A vaccine with no side effects at all comes out that you take ensuring you will never ever be infected with the virus
-1
The Living Tombstone
All NPCs are now zombies
-4
Backstabber
Do 2x damage to any creature whose Friendship score is above 65. (+1 Twilit)
-25
Your starting tree now grows 1 infant rhesus monkey per month
+4
2000s Nostalgia
You look like Homestar Runner now.[367]
-1
5 water balloons (filled), 20 unfilled
-80
For A Good Cause
-80 points, but they go to someone who really needs them. (+1 Warm Feeling)
+81
Get A Job, Nigger
Fuck those freeloaders. Take your points back and then some. (-1000 Karma)[-19]
-1
A small potted cactus
-1
You may choose any little hat you would like for your cactus.[368]
-1
Master the art of breathing through your mouth
(+1 Dex)
-35
Sicko
Quadrupedal creatures are now more attractive
-1
Duuuuuude
Grass is now Weed
-1
A clear plastic bag full of 40 shark teeth
-1
A soccer ball that can double as an exit bag
-1
Five 100 count paper towel rolls
-1
MICKED
You are branded with a Queen of Shamrocks tattoo (+0.05 Lck, +100 Fealty to Celts)
-4
Move Along
On one island, The All-American Rejects will be performing a concert. (+1 Ach)
-20
Steelman
You can now summon a hostile copy of a nearby monster that is 100x more powerful but drops 10x better loot.[369]
+2
Do It for the Vine
A small vine plant begins to grow on your island. You feel strongly compelled to help it grow as tall as possible, even at the expense of your other goals. Who knows, maybe one day you'll be able to climb it to somewhere... (+1 Plant Alignment)
-1
Your starting tree now grows 300 random flavor jellybeans per month
-1
Last Shade
Before fighting the World Dragon, you will see your starting tree for the last time, alive again and fully replenished.
-50
Every week, summon a cool friend from high school to hang out with and share memes.
-5
Trimmed Armor
The better an item's stats are, the cooler it looks.
-1
A nightcore remix of Things That Rhyme With Orange by I Set My Friends On Fire on vinyl
(+0.01 Lck, but only once the nightcore remix of Things That Rhyme With Orange has been played)
-3.5
Longcat is Long
You can become longcat at will[370]
-10
Your highschool shop teacher joins you for the second year of the challenge
-45
An undeveloped polaroid picture.
When shaken, an image of a man holding a revolver right at the camera appears. If left to fully develop, a bullet with the same force as one being shot from a Colt Single Action Army materializes and rips through anything in its path.[371]
-1
At The Speed of Light
The starting tree grows fruit 1% faster
-80
Fairy Tail
Certain smaller races get a lot stretchier...
-1
DEI
You become half-orc (-3 Int)
-1
Splash And Tear
Simple Water Gun pistol. Upgrades into a machine water gun if heavy water is used. Super-heavy water upgrades it into a BFWG.
-1
Jar of 20 King Cobras in Guangdong Formaldehyde
(-25 Chineseum Esscence)
-1
Melty Bag
A brown paper bag that absorbs sound.
-2.5
Nothing To Hide
A set of flexiglass clothes.
-1
Etched Into the Annals of History
After defeating the World Dragon, youtuber "evenewon2007" will upload a video essay documenting your exploits, amassing a total of 7,644 views and 86 likes before the eventual heat death of the universe.
-1
500 milliliters of charcoal lighter fluid in a Ziploc® sandwich-sized plastic bag.
WARNING: Contents under pressure!
-1
A gaming PC that doesn't POST and I think someone took all the RAM out of it except one stick
-1
Alucard
You become a reverse vampire.[372]
+8
Truth or Consequences
Everyone else can intuitively tell when you lie. Lying repeatedly permanently decreases your luck. (+1 Integrity)
-1
5 inflatable pool donuts
-1
Well That Happened
You start with a magical well on your island that shows you random snippets of any of your escapades since arriving on the island when you toss in any amount of any currency (only works once a day)[373]
-9
Capman
A large glove you can wear on your head which can be controlled as if a hand were inside it.
+1
Anatomical Error
Your right hand is now a left hand.
-1
A 12-inch pianist
-1
Star Wars
On an island far, far away, the Brown, Red, Yellow, and White Dwarves fight in a neverending war... Will you be the one to bring them peace?
-10
May The Forge Be With You
If you can bring peace to the dwarves, they will share their ancient knowledge on how to make the Light Saber.
-1
Close To You
Your atoms can now get 1 femtometer closer to the atoms of other objects/beings
-1
a Jansport backpack with a giant hole ripped in the bottom

+1
The strength of gravity has been rounded up to 10m/s.

Holesome

Land Tax

Code Switching

Ren Fair

Fat Loot

Cold-blooded
You catch a cold more often.

Kiss Me I'm Irish
Become temporarily Irish after you take a substantial amount of damage. You can only transform back to normal by causing a substantial amount of damage to another creature.

Mr. World Wide

Bulletproof

The Man From The 'Verse

-77.7
Lucky Coin
You receive a coin which will randomly multiply or divide a stat (except Lck) each time you flip it. Effects last for an hour. Flipping the same stat twice replaces the current buff/debuff.[381][382][383][384]

Brace Yourself

-7
Warhammer

-1
A 0.85 meter long elgiloy compression spring[385]
-1
I Paused My Game To Be Here

-1
An ancient, antique corpse is buried on your island. Mostly in good condition[386]
-1
Herodotean Revisionism
The truth comes to light. (-MAX Ach)
-5
Scrap of Solomon's Contract

Aspect of Glenn
All of your limbs are replaced with tentacles which you can mix and match the style of freely. (+5 Chef's Whimsy)

Make The 'Verse Great Again

Die Zauberflöte
A magic flute, which when a song of 3.5 minutes in length (or greater) is played upon it, spawns 50 crickets. 30 minute cooldown.[387]

Have Some Pride

-1
SHOOP DA WHOOP

-1
The Wauce Is Boss

-1

-

It's Arcade Time

-1

-1

-1

Neue Cyoa Deux After Dark

+7
Really Hits The Spot

-12
Sinister Link
You can now merge your left hand with any other matter and it will act as if it's attached to your body. Your left hand will not displace any of the other matter, just attach you to it.[398]

Steve's Lava Chicken

Lifeline

+3
Smile Dog

-1
Let's Find Out
You get a small crystal ball which allows you to tune in to the infrequent livecasts of a wizard who was unfairly banished from his kingdom. He offers a lot of sage advice on wizardry, role-playing games, and how you should interact with different races in The 'Verse.

Gilligan
Your island gets a rowboat tied to its dock (REQUIRES DOCK)

Control Alt Delete
Games'Verse now stocks banned video games

>be me
>greentext out loud

-1
A model train filled with a viscous fluid that when bathed in removes Cursed wounds
-1
The Toker
Things are now 420 times funnier when you smoke weed
-1
Nostalgia
Your childhood memories are modified to be more positive (especially "that"). You forget about the existence of this item.
-1
A glass stein filled with warm Mello Yello Cherry
+5
Sponsored By
Conversations with other sapient beings must include mention of FanDuel or Spotify® at least once per hour of cumulative conversation time, or your run ends.
+3
I Don't See Anything
Everything within 666 gigameters of your starting island is now within the maw of Cetus Iuniperi (+3 Obscure, +1 Eye)
-4
1kg of aluminum powder in a sealed container
-7.5
Seer's
Furniture catalog for your island that comes once a month. Items can be bought using any applicable currency. Can only buy 1 of each item listed. Items are severely overpriced.
-1
Moment of Truth
Once you defeat the World Dragon you will learn the true meaning of C.Y.O.A.
-1
Fake Fans
All Neue Cyoa Deux: Skyblock Edition secondaries are sent to the Torture Dimension.
+0.5
One Door Opens...
Anytime you open a door, a door somewhere else closes.
-1
Always Bet On Black
Your Lck increases by 0.5% if you're wearing all black
-18
The True Man Show
50 years from now, an extra-terrestrial race (native to the 'Verse) will visit Earth. They will crash their ship in Neo Roswell, ███ ██████. If found alive, the authorities will quickly destroy them. However, inside their ship is a 24/7 live stream of your exact Run shot on candid camera that they were busy watching before entering our atmosphere. At first, the government will sit on the footage and keep it under wraps. Eventually, tuning in to your Run will become the global pastime. If you manage to finish your Run before all intelligent life on Earth is extinct, you will be hailed as a hero, and will retire in luxury.[399]
-5
Style Over Substance
The worse an item's stats are, the cooler it looks.
-1
Dat Frog
Randomly occurring islands now have 50% more frogs and unicycles.
-1
You temporarily gain amazing and impeccable driving skills
-1
Not Like Us
Humanoid-adjacent races such as flesh faeries, river goblins, ghost titans, and stone imps will instinctively see you as friendly, while non-humanoid creatures will see you as an enemy.
-1
Hero's Journey
One chance to bounce back up if you fall into the abyss.
-1
Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
You now have a loyal tiger as a pet, but as a result the World Dragon has rendered itself permanently invisible to any advanced technological detection systems.[400]

No Fun Allowed
All items are now significantly nerfed in order to balance difficulty and gameplay.

History Is Written By The Victors
Famous 'Verse historian Victor Parblum joins you on your island. He's an esteemed professor, so the squalor of your island may appal him. If you wish to get any juicy factoids out of him, you may need to tidy up the place so he can get cozy...
-1
Might Makes Right
Killing Victor will grant you several stat bonuses.[401]
+4
To The Victor Go The Spoils
Any item drops from creatures you slay will automatically be given to Victor and you will have to convince or otherwise coerce him into giving you them.[402]

It's Montenegrin to Me

Close Enough

A second-generation iPod Touch with infinite power
The only song on it is "In the End" by Linkin Park. You can't add any other songs, and if you try to delete "In the End," the device shuts off forever.[403]

Amish Paradise
Elves no longer rely on magitech-based vehicles and appliances.
-700
Due Process
Upon death, you are given the opportunity to speak to the Board of Versemasters for twenty seconds to present a case arguing why, based on your perks, runs and/or items, your deathblow shouldn’t have killed you. The Board of Versemasters has the ability to repeal your death, but is extremely difficult to convince. None of your runs, items or perks will be active during the conversation.

I'd Buy That For a Dollar
Your starting tree now grows money instead of leaves.[404]

A decent scuba mask, 0.5L filled oxygen tank, and manual pump

You instantly learn any language of your choosing.

I Got A Ring In There Last Night

Wrath of Vesta

-10
You now see the world from a bird's-eye view but you need to concentrate to control the mouse pointer that moves you around.
-20
You gain the ability to zoom in or out with the camera. There is a clamp on how far you can zoom out. The view will reset itself to the default camera position after 4 seconds of non-zooming activity.
-10
The mouse now has two buttons instead of one, and left clicking on an entity will tell you its race and a general description of what they do.
-10
When hovering your mouse over an item, material, or entity, you will see what it's called near the pointer. Only works with things you know about. Requires gaining knowledge of unknown entities and materials to see this descriptor.

Nightmare Mode

QWOP
A mysterious figure will appear every 7 months to give you cryptic portents of your current run in an mobster-like voice
+4
Yin & Yang
Good is no longer "good" and Evil is no longer "bad". Chinese practices like torturing animals before slaughter in order to make them taste better are more common. (+10 "Karma")
-5
Kidd Hardladd
Aye, up and at 'em! We've got monsters to slay! is how Kidd Hardladd likes to start the day. Young Hardladd is a quixotic Elfen adventurer-in-training that's got the bravery of a knight three times his size. Despite his young age and lithe body, Kidd has slew more monsters in his time than most of the adults in his village! He's quite crafty and a little mischievious, but the elders from all the surrounding islands speak goldenly of his valor. "I may just be a Kidd, but I pack a mean whallop!" - Something he likes to say. Hearing of the grand pickle you've got yourself into, Kidd can't help but to join your cause! "They don't call me Hardladd fer nothin'!" He's ready to venture with you to the ends of The 'Verse to defeat the World Dragon, and he won't let anything, not even his Non-Hodgkin's lymphoma, get in the way.
+45
All magic becomes science
WARNING: This may have unintended consequences.
-4
Bugger Rabbit
A certain sassy humanoid cartoon rabbit joins you! He may not realize cartoon physics don't apply to you. He only has the durability of a cartoon character and lacks other extraordinary traits outside of animation gags.

All colors are randomly mapped to different ones

Light Starter Pack

Where Be The Booty?

One-Armed Bandit
At any point in time a considerable amount of loot is gathered up within one location (whether inside of your inventory, in a container, or sitting on the ground in the world, etc.) a dwarfish gnomelike brownie with one arm may appear and attempt to make off with the goods within 10 seconds if not dealt with. Items that the brownie was carrying from its own stash may also be added to the loot.

Permanent Puppy Punishment Uniform (PPP Uniform Set)
A modified Hachiko High School uniform designed by Coco & Angel specifically to punish, humiliate & control Teve. It was created with the help of Mittens and Ginger, who repurposed an ancient demon imprisonment ritual, to make sure that once equipped, it could no longer be removed nor destroyed, even in death. The uniform includes a cropped shirt, a tie and a school swimsuit. The swimsuit has a built in null bulge that can vibrate and shock, but also makes Teve's genitals difficult to stimulate.
+1 Punished Puppy
+1 Vibration (inactive)
+1 Shocked (inactive)
+1 Purrmanent Seal
+5
You permanently have a slight sniffle. Everyone thinks it's a horrible contagious disease and will avoid you until you convince them it's just a cold.
(-10 Respect)

You Matter

Burning Man

Zalgo
H̶̨͔̦̉͂̈́̾̿̆ë̵̖̯ ̶͚̲̌̉̆̈͑́̍͐̈́̀̈̍͝ĉ̸̨̛̗̠͉ͅo̸̧͍̹̲͎̗͔͒̄͝m̸̧̡͍̯̲̳̫͚̃̋́̏̎͋̃̽̄͘e̵̞̹̠͇͖͖͖̼͒́́̎s̷͕̠̪̹̤̬͑̄̂̇̒̽̀͊́̑̒̇̌̚̕ͅ
-1
My Blood Is Your Blood Now
You now have access to your bloodline's Kekkei Genkai, allowing use of special powers, techniques, and magic passed down from generation to generation. Use your power wisely...
-1000
Tentougan - Eyes Of Ra
Your eyes now let you see through light no matter how bright. You can control light itself and even call the power of The Sun to your side.
-1000
Chinuki No Soujutsu - Blood Bending
You can now control the blood of yourself and others, as well as form it into solid matter or weapons, or tranfuse it into yourself.
-1000
Yomibi - The Tail Of Hell
You gain a black, nigh-indestructable tail forged from the souls of hell. You may use the tail itself as a weapon, or reform its mass into limbs or something else with a simple command.
-1000
Obakekugutsu - Ghost Puppet
Any dolls or puppets you create will come to life and can be puppeteered by you. You may imbue each puppet with any sort of singular property.
-1000
Hosseigan - Eyes Of Genesis
Your eyes now let you see the cause and entire past of anything singular thing, person, or property.
-1000
Rikugougan - Eyes Of The Cosmos
Your eyes now let you see anywhere from any position, no matter the distance.
-1000
Houyoku - Flying Phoenix
You now have burning red wings that let you fly throughout The 'Verse at very fast speeds. If your wings are destroyed, they will instantly regrow.
-1000
Sennin No Tamashii - Soul Of The Immortal
You are immune to aging, accidental death, death from hunger, illnesses, curses, poison, venom, and any form of nonfatal damage.
-1000
Juuokunenyume - Billion Year Dream
You gain the ability to use extremely powerful Genjutsu, allowing you to manipulate the senses of others. Your ability will get better the more you train.
-1200
Kanshiriki - The Powerful Sixty
Great power is granted to you based on the current year represented by the Kanshi, or Sexagenary Cycle. Each power is as follows:
Kinoe Ne - Wood Rat: Exceptional ability in creation of various tools.
Kinoto Ushi - Wood Ox: Immunity to all pain and suffering.
Hinoe Tora - Fire Tiger: Great increase in power, additionally with the ability to freely control anger.
Hinoto U - Fire Rabbit: Weapons will never miss the target you set out to hit.
Tsuchinoe Tatsu - Earth Dragon: Gravity now bends to your will. Walk across The 'Verse as if it were ground.
Tsuchinoto Mi - Earth Snake: Ability to dig through any material with your bare hands.
Kanoe Uma - Metal Horse: Ability to run faster than any vehicle. In addition, while running, your body is stronger than steel.
Kanoto Hitsuji - Metal Goat: Ability to consume anything for nutrients. During digestion, you can attain the property of whatever you have ingested.
Mizunoe Saru - Water Monkey: Swim through the air like a fish. General agility is also increased hundredfold.
Mizunoto Tori - Water Rooster: Water now fuels your Soul-flame, granting you power the more you drink.
Kinoe Inu - Wood Dog: All of your coordination and reflexes are now maximized.
Kinoto I - Wood Pig: Nothing is too heavy for you to carry.
Hinoe Ne - Fire Rat: Small creatures and insects now bend to your Authority. You may control them at will.
Hinoto Ushi - Fire Ox: All physical blows can be endured. Your strength is like an iron wall.
Tsuchinoe Tora - Earth Tiger: Ability to avoid almost any attack if you know it's coming.
Tsuchinoto U - Earth Rabbit: You are invisible to anyone as long as you make no noise.
Kanoe Tatsu - Metal Dragon: Weapons are leagues more powerful now than they normally would be.
Kanoto Mi - Metal Snake: You can teleport over large distances with a single thought.
Mizunoe Uma - Water Horse: Water is no longer an obstacle for you. Walk, run, and jump over it like ground.
Mizunoto Hitsuji - Water Goat: Melt anything into liquid with a touch.
Kinoe Saru - Wood Monkey: Your limbs can now morph into anything you'd like, including weapons.
Kinoto Tori - Wood Rooster: Ability to detect and hear sounds from any distance away.
Hinoe Inu - Fire Dog: Power increased greatly. In addition, others will always underestimate you.
Hinoto I - Fire Pig: Bacon damage is now increased millionfold. In addition, choose one another element from the following list to increase thousandfold: Light, Dark, Poison, Doom, Good, Evil, Ice, Fire, Water, Stone, Metal, Shadow, Air, Energy or Ghost.
Tsuchinoe Ne - Earth Rat: You are now healthy and strong no matter what.
Tsuchinoto Ushi - Earth Ox: Greatly increased luck.
Kanoe Tora - Metal Tiger: Gain the brain of an armsmaster. Blueprints for powerful weapons of destruction come to you easily.
Kanoto U - Metal Rabbit: Never run out of energy. Always be at your maximal strength.
Mizunoe Tatsu - Water Dragon: All liquid now bends to your will.
Mizunoto Mi - Water Snake: Ability to masterfully craft all your words and lies. Additionally, charisma greatly increased.
Kinoe Uma - Wood Horse: No one ever considers you an enemy.
Kinoto Hitsuji - Wood Goat: Ability to convert matter into any other form or material.
Hinoe Saru - Fire Monkey: Ability to use any martial arts (human or 'Verse-based) at a professional level.
Hinoto Tori - Fire Rooster: Women of all races swoon at the sight of you.
Tsuchinoe Inu - Earth Dog: All animals are tameable within minutes. They will follow your every command.
Tsuchinoto I - Earth Pig: Every day is pleasureable, and you always feel motivated to do your best.
Kanoe Ne - Metal Rat: Technology of all kinds bend towards your will. In addition, tinkering with any technology comes easy to you.
Kanoto Ushi - Metal Ox: Damage to anyone ignores their defenses.
Mizunoe Tora - Water Tiger: Ability to use Soul Magic at a veteran level without any additional rituals to begin.
Mizunoto U - Water Rabbit: Weather, seasons, temperature, and environmental effects in a general area can be changed at will.
Kinoe Tatsu - Wood Dragon: All enemies, creatures, and beings are now ten times weaker than normal.
Kinoto Mi - Wood Snake: Your starting tree now grows one thousand times faster. It can also grow to limitless heights.
Hinoe Uma - Fire Horse: Chaos reigns throughout The 'Verse for your enemies. Order comes to you easily.
Hinoto Hitsuji - Fire Goat: Immunity to fire and other heat or light-based magical attacks.
Tsuchinoe Saru - Earth Monkey: Grow any plants or fungi instantly.
Tsuchinoto Tori - Earth Rooster: Regenerate wounds and damage one hundred times faster, without any loss of energy.
Kanoe Inu - Metal Dog: Ability to steal familiars, slaves, or summons bounded to other beings and use them yourself.
Kanoto I - Metal Pig: Money, gems, and general riches come to you easily.
Mizunoe Ne - Water Rat: Ability to shrink yourself down by any amount.
Mizunoto Ushi - Water Ox: All physical and magical attacks phase through you.
Kinoe Tora - Wood Tiger: Control whether someone will remember any action involving you or not.
Kinoto U - Wood Rabbit: INT and WIS both increased by 100.
Hinoe Tatsu - Fire Dragon: Tenfold increase in all stats.
Hinoto Mi - Fire Snake: Inflict a powerful poison, venom, or curse through touch.
Tsuchinoe Uma - Earth Horse: Any being weaker than you will die on touch.
Tsuchinoto Hitsuji - Earth Goat: Any being less intelligent than you will give you any valuable or thing you desire.
Kanoe Saru - Metal Monkey: Ability to easily control the emotions of others.
Kanoto Tori - Metal Rooster: Death is no longer a possibility for you.
Mizunoe Inu - Water Dog: Succeed and win in anything as long as another being considers it a challenge.
Mizunoto I - Water Pig: Immunity to any amount of force that is more than ten times the amount needed to fatally wound you.
-50
You can breed animals like in Minecraft, but any animal obtained through this method eventually becomes vicious and attempts to kill you
-1
Crack Nigga
Smoking crack now has twice the normal effect
-1
Crack Chigga
Smoking opium now has twice the normal effect

-1
Bovinic
An extra stomach.
-1
Darklord
The amount of Dark Mana you can hold is now unbounded (+10 Dark, -100 Holy)
-1

-16
Status Symbol
A necklace with a four-pointed star which gives knowledge of all of your stats (except hidden ones) when you wear it. NPCs who see you with it equipped will assume you are person of importance.

The outside world is paused while you sleep, but you can sleep for a maximum of 4h per day and always experience nightmares

Objects constantly slip out of your grasp, making tools and weapons impossible to use.

-65
Marvelous Misadventure
You now know the exact location of Candied Island.

(+1 Whimsy)
-1
I Give My Life
All options which increase your lifespan now grant Ach instead, with an exchange rate of 4 years = 1 Ach.[447]
+100

It's too late. There is nothing you can do.

Hamburger Hill
One selected chunk of the map gets completely covered in cooked steaks, but every creature on it instantly dies.
-1
Positive Role Models
A larger percentage of orcs are in high-status white collar jobs instead of barbaric rape tribes. (+1 Combatted Stereotype)
-75
Your island is installed with an All-you-can-eat Korean BBQ.[448]
+4
Hit the Bell
Someone else ringing a bell in front of you instantly hypnotizes you.
-1
Chat, Is This Real?
Choose one real friend of yours. Your friend will receive a VGA monitor (640 x 480 resolution) in the mail which, when plugged in, broadcasts your life through your eyes. Only your friend can see it.[449]
-1
Sound Blaster
Headphones can now be plugged in to the monitor to allow your friend to listen to what you're hearing.
-1
Crystal Clear Picture
The monitor now has 4K resolution with true color display
+15
Stream Snipe
Your friend gets a big red button under glass with the word "KILL" on it in white lettering. If the button is pushed by anyone or anything, you will instantly die
-100
Backseat Gaming
Your friend gets a mouse which can be used to highlight objects or entities onscreen (shifting their colors 50% closer to #f4cc2c) for 1 second. Clicking again will toggle the effect on or off early. Only 1 object can be clicked at a time.
-1
Trackball Btw
The mouse is a trackball mouse
-1
A chess set with extra pieces that are confusingly shaped
-5
Golden Apple
Your aphantasia is cured.
-1

(+30 Aura)
-15
Cool Whip
You now have a 5-foot long leather whip. (+1 Reach)
-11

The whip is now a metal chain with a spiked flail on the very tip of it. (+5 pointed remark)

Devo Fan
The whip is now a a fire whip. (+9 scalding)

How Can I Help You Hombre

Runic Mysteries
Air Runes, Water Runes, Earth Runes, Fire Runes, Mind Runes, Body Runes, Chaos Runes, Nature Runes, Law Runes, Cosmic Runes, Astral Runes, Death Runes, Blood Runes, Soul Runes, Wrath Runes, Mist Runes, Dust Runes, Smoke Runes, Echo Runes, Surge Runes, Storm Runes, Floral Runes, Optic Runes, Light Runes, Thunder Runes, Musk Runes, Tithe Runes, Wisp Runes, Void Runes, Mud Runes, Steam Runes, Flux Runes, Tide Runes, Shifter Runes, Moss Runes, Harmony Runes, Lunar Runes, Mirror Runes, Bloat Runes, Leech Runes, Warp Runes, Tempest Runes, Lava Runes, Charge Runes, Humus Runes, Tremor Runes, Fertile Runes, Equity Runes, Charm Runes, Shadow Runes, Crypt Runes, Rebirth Runes, Mana Runes, Seismic Runes, Zeal Runes, Ash Runes, Blitz Runes, Ember Runes, Forge Runes, Pulse Runes, Solar Runes, Dread Runes, Plasma Runes, Vigour Runes, Doom Runes, Vital Runes, Fluster Runes, Bliss Runes, Wisdom Runes, Lucid Runes, Clarity Runes, Slumber Runes, Forfeit Runes, Spirit Runes, Rage Runes, Twisted Runes, Fungal Runes, Mystic Runes, Celestial Runes, Amalgam Runes, Necrotic Runes, Flesh Runes, Spectral Runes, Sunder Runes, Blight Runes, Sin Runes, Trance Runes, Scramble Runes, Fester Runes, Reaver Runes, Harpy Runes, Havoc Runes, Trophic Runes, Life Runes, Morph Runes, Vile Runes, Primal Runes, Anima Runes, Venom Runes, Eternal Runes, Portal Runes, Penance Runes, Edict Runes, Pious Runes, Judgement Runes, Divine Runes, Jinx Runes, Wild Runes, Aether Runes, Time Runes, Rot Runes, Gore Runes, Mimic Runes, Fusion Runes, Purge Runes, Nether Runes, Nihil Runes, Miasma Runes, Slaughter Runes, and Scourge Runes can now be crafted at their respective altars using Runic Essence.
FanDuel Footnotes
⭣ To Bottom ⭣
⭣ To Bottom ⭣
⭣ To Bottom ⭣
⭣ To Bottom ⭣
⭣ To Bottom ⭣
⭣ To Bottom ⭣
⭣ To Bottom ⭣
⭣ To Bottom ⭣
⭣ To Bottom ⭣
⭣ To Bottom ⭣
I. Images accompanying items and runs are purely decorative and should not be considered canon. Only item descriptions, run descriptions, the FanDuel Footnotes, and the content of any appendices should be considered canon. II. The World Dragon's size is not proportionate to its strength. III. You start wearing the clothes you are currently wearing. Any other minor accessories you're wearing (goggles, fingerless gloves, non-smart watches, friendship bracelets, etc) are also carried over. Bulletproof vests and other OP clothing items are not taken with you. All other items on your person are left behind. IV. Anything which grows on the starting tree is created ex nihilo, but at the same rate as a normal tree that would produce said item (unless specified otherwise) V. Wearing the full lobster armor set increases your Aquaticism by 5. VI. Some races may consider you wearing lobster armor a form of cultural appropriation. VII. If you choose multiple runs that change the win condition, you must complete all conditions in order to win. All conditions that involve a competition with the World Dragon (debate, baseball, etc.) must be done in alphabetical order after reaching its lair with only brief breaks in-between. The exact length of the breaks can be discussed with the World Dragon at an appropriate time. The alphabetical order of competitions with the World Dragon is based on the name of the Run that requires the competition, not the competition itself. VIII. Your points cannot be used to buy items after you enter The 'Verse, but maybe you can find another use for them somewhere.... IX. World Dragon and its followers' Power Levels directly correlate to how good they are at baseball X. The World Dragon plays on a big enough baseball field to hold it XI. Making the World Dragon female will lower its Power Level by 0.1% XII. 10 cm³ of Star Material is enough to support any amount of land on top of it. XIII. Star Material can only be moved by creatures with Intent (requires a soul) XIV. the ambient temperature of the void is 21.8 °C (71.24 °F) XV. Monsters only drop lootboxes upon death. Lootbox drop rates can be found in Appendix B. XVI. Void dust is made up of approximately 1/3 quartz, 1/3 chromite, and 1/3 organic residue (dead skin etc). Don't breathe this! XVII. Wind can still happen underwater or in space. XVIII. Your starting tree, by default, will grow acorns at the same rate as a normal oak tree. Leaves and branches will regrow at a normal rate, but it will never grow extra branches or leaves or get larger. XIX. You will not be crushed by infinite air/water pressure from the void. XX. Death Island kills all living beings within a certain fixed radius. Only robots and ghosts inhabit Death Island. XXI. Those who stay awake for longer than 3 days open themselves to receiving Horned Calf's Blight XXII. The Ruby of Kur becomes visible to those who stay awake for longer than 16 days. XXIII. After 52 days without sleep, the Ruby of Kur begins to descend. XXIV. The World Dragon has a soul XXV. "-MAX points" means you cannot select any other items except necessary prerequisites to get that item and all points are used in taking it XXVI. "Candy" as a category is something you'll have to figure out for yourself while in The 'Verse XXVII. Star Fruit and American Dream can be taken together. Star Material is considered Candy. XXVIII. Any Co-Op or *-Op option cannot choose the same friend. All friends will experience Truedeath unless your run is completed, in which case they will be resurrected. XXIX. 1 child soul <==> 10 kilocandies <==> 5 toy ingots (ludized) XXX. All benefits and drawbacks apply to all players in a *-Op run. XXXI. Any hours added to your lifespan will stack additively. XXXII. Stats reset to your base level on death (except alignments) XXXIII. The World Dragon is immune to Poison, Instant Death, Hypnotized, Confused, Dazed, Darkness, Radiation Sickness, Curse, Hex, Freeze, Deep Freeze, On Fire, Aura, Shocked, Sleep, Diamondized, Petrify, Stupefy, Exhausted, Psychosis, Mental Illness, Drunk, Berserker, Genocide, Incest, Gerrymandering, Death Sentence, Nicotine Withdrawal, Weed, Addiction, Weed Addiction, Heavenly Damage, Hell Damage, Dark Damage, Light Damage, Lightning Damage, Neutral Damage, Obscure Damage, ADHD, Autism, Schizophrenia, LOVE, Evil Damage, Tuberculosis, Good Damage, Tweaking, Doom, Scared, Mindbreak, Politics, Sexual Damage (unless female), Cheapshots, Dimensional Damage, Fall Damage, Death Island, Slighted Honor, Reputation Damage, Alcoholism, Joy, Moralism, Vapors (unless female), Hysteria (unless female), Irrationality (unless female), Crying (unless female), Night Terrors, Bedwetting, Aroused (unless female), Dream Damage, Astral Damage, Shroomed, Freudian Slips, Suicide, Party Fouls, Meta Damage, Speeding Tickets, Poprocks and Coca Cola, Toothaches, Headaches, Migraines, Gout, Stomach Bug, Ebola, Tapeworms, Prions, Imbalanced Humours, Nostalgia, World-weariness, Environmentalism, Feminism (unless female), Wokeism, Sciatica, Blue Damage, Arthritis, Embarrassment, Maxwell's Notebook, Curiosity Damage, Graphic Depictions of Violence, Tardiness, Induced Empathy, Meeting Doppelganger, Usury, Debt, Imposter Syndrome, Illusions, Negativity, Demotion, Pink Slip, Black Card, Wage Garnishment, ACTing, Sociopathy, Psychopathy, Broke, Time Magic, Ick (unless female), Pathos, Logical Fallacies, Stepping on Legos, Bad Trips, The Munchies, Furry, Anhedonia, Bind, Evil Gaze, Righteous Judgment, Verisimilitude, Lethargy, Water Element, Earth Element, Red Damage, Splinters, Bleed, Stun, Knight's Crest, Dragon Shouts, Curse of the Prawn, Fatigue, Leprosy, Sin, Ichor, Time Paradox, Fate Damage, Shifting Timelines, Seduction (unless female...), Friendship, Love, Parasite, Hate, Kismesis, Kekkei Genkai, Gaslighting, Depth Perception, Myopia, Auto-Updates, Birth Control, Akinator, Inhalants, Appeal to Authority, Court Orders, Star Damage, Sun Damage, Solar Flare, Divine Intervention, Retcons, Flipped Bits, Logos, Yellow Damage, Lag Damage, Frame Drops, Cheating, Rehabilitation, Frustum Culling, Object Pop In, Reverse Engineering, Datamining, NP-Hardness, Lightsabers, Diabetes, Castle Doctrine, Systematic Oppression, Reflect, Voodoo, Hoodoo, Juju, Grooming, Bad Opsec, Telefrags, Doxxing, Learned Helplessness, Lack of Confidence, Erectile Dysfunction, Homesickness, Enneagrams, Norwooding, Mood Swings (unless female), Disappointment, Hentai, Proxies, Hyperfixation, EPI, Intrusive Thoughts, Loud Music, Vaccines, Nickelodeon Slime, Jailbait, Pedophilia, Hebephilia, Ephebophilia, Cancel Culture, Thyroid Problems, That Dragon Cancer, Cancer, Aimbot, Stubbing Toe, Old Wives Tales, Integer Overflow, Infidelity, Cuckolding, Animal Magnetism, Trench Foot, Free Radicals, Malnutrition, Heavenly Bonds, Cartridge Tilting, Flame Wars, Indignity, Bashfulness, Charm, Constipation, Torpor, Bad Deals, Contrarianism, Bombing Jokes, Speech Checks, Weapon Durability, Cringe, Oneitis, Necromancy, Soiled, Tarnish, Snowman, Oil Slick, Banana Peel, Black Lung, Christmas Cheer, Daylight Savings, Gasoline, Affirmative Action, Bothsidesism, Black Plague, Black Fatigue, Suplex, Global Warming, Deaf, Mute, Plato's Cave, Mind Blown, Greed, Rule of Cool, Shrunken, Sciolism, Scoliosis, Luck Damage, Last Resort, Lumbar Lordosis, Dry Ice, Self-Actualization, Wickedness, Criminal Element, Low Orbit Ion Cannon, The Prisoner's Dilemma, Shoop Da Whoop, Chuck Norris, Ultima, DDoS, Rickrolls, The Game, Longcat, Deleting System 32, Alt-F4, VAC Bans, Rage Bait, FOTM, Satire, Spoilers, Suggestion, Clickbait, Immunity Dog, Bass Boosting, Absurdism, Dragonbane Weapons, Toad, Silence, Blind, Terrify, Paralysis, and Slow XXXIV. The sun in The 'Verse is unreachable and provides the same amount of light everywhere. The temperature varies by location in The 'Verse and is innate and seasonal. The sun rotates around the sky of the void and becomes the moon when it reaches the horizon, causing night. XXXV. Slimes are non-hostile but consume all forms of loose matter which they can absorb into their bodies and dissolve, increasing their mass and then dividing to produce more slimes. They also consume emotions and memories (absorbing from the noosphere) causing brain damage if you spend too much time around them. Slimes change their nature depending on the type of material they absorb. Slimes that absorb a lot of human attributes become more intelligent, slimes that absorb rocks harden, slimes that absorb water become less viscous, etc XXXVI. ADDON choices can only be taken if the corresponding base choice is also taken XXXVII. Click here to play in fullscreen. XXXVIII. There are clouds and weather in The 'Verse. XXXIX. In The 'Verse some multi-species insect colonies have formed as a result of extreme symbiosis. They behave like a hive and the queen has human-level intelligence. XL. All items will be added to your starting chest unless stated otherwise or room runs out. Items will then be placed in stacks on your island or on any satellite islands which you have purchased. The stacking of items will be guaranteed not to break or destroy other items within reason, but large enough stacks may cause some items to fall off the island/satellite islands if there is not enough space for them. XLI. Snakes exist. XLII. If the Japanese language is removed from existence by a perk or for some other reason, the fortune cookie's proverb from the "Gotcha"™ gacha machine will instead be written in a strange variant of Chinese no one has ever seen before, giving you -1 wisdom regardless of understanding. XLIII. There is at least 1 radio tower somewhere in The 'Verse. XLIV. Josephine isn't interested in a relationship right now. XLV. Monsters, creatures, and NPCs "spawn" at the start of your journey. There are no "respawn" mechanics, as may be common in video games, except through various means of reproduction. XLVI. You can find Slime Island if you look hard enough. WARNING: It may be close to Death Island. XLVII. Humans are not a naturally occuring race in The 'Verse. XLVIII. The World Mountain is situated past The Outer Shores, at The Edge of Reason in Locura. XLIX. P.O.I.N.T.s = Percentage Of Items Not Taken L. If an island is flipped upside down twice, it will stay the right way up. LI. All Celtic related options buff resistance to alcohol poisoning by 5% (additive) LII. Your starting island and tree are, by default, barren of all other life except microbes. LIII. All item descriptions, run descriptions, footnotes, and corrections should be interpreted as uncharitably as possible. LIV. In any run where the World Dragon must be active and unsummoned, it will be temporarily summoned during those activities but will be invincible unless all the Radiant Shards are collected. LV. Any influence the World Dragon has over the world while unsummoned will be through its minions. LVI. There are other "boss monsters" besides the World Dragon, Magma Demon, Black Hole Demon, Radiation Demon, Ghost Demon, and Lava Demon. LVII. Any items which permanently alter your form will blend cohesively, eg Humiliation Ritual and Every Dog Has His Day will make you a goblin-like dog (distinct from a doglin). LVIII. For any *-Op items or runs and "Chat, Is This Real?", long-distance friends (over the internet or pen pals) do count as "real life" friends, as long as both of you have spent at least 4 hours communicating with each other. LIX. The 'Verse extends infinitely in all directions. LX. Every death in The 'Verse causes Truedeath unless stated otherwise. LXI. Increasing your Score high enough upgrades you to a higher ending Rank. Rank A is required to get the best ending CG, but you can always try to get an even higher Score and Rank to get your name to the top of the Scoreboard. Taking multiple Runs can help with this.
